            494.Narrator: *You take in every scent the night breeze carries. Sweet honeysuckle, tender violets - and an earthy fragrance you can't quite recognise.*EPI_Epilogue_Wyll_PassedNatureCheck

          948.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Forest trees draped in moss. Bittersweet, smoky - and that faintest hint of vanilla.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f7c35049-b067-4756-cb9d-f1696a614ebcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h21b07015g3bb3g4137g92efga41c26b46af7Text UUID: e8057455-e0c3-4cbd-a2e6-e562354439fbTimeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f7c35049-b067-4756-cb9d-f1696a614ebcTimeline Phase Duration: 9.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • +
            8.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Reminds me of the Wilden Oak, the acorn I gave you - and the promise I made.CAMP_Wyll_Act3Romance_Event_BeganORI_State_PartneredWithWyll

            • +
              142.Origin_Intro_Wyll: For you, I'd destroy every fiend in the deepest Hell. But I think you might just beat me to it.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 28418d91-6b29-acb6-7fc2-f0e5fa4c4ce8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: had900ab7g6cdeg4755gb4b5gf56d9a5cf88aText UUID: 5cca8f3a-48d5-4afd-be18-b7349e2798c8Group ID: 02253ac6-478d-f707-646e-2907b7799471Group Index: 1
              • +
                672.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Who would've thought that just one of them held the key to escaping Avernus for good?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ae38185a-8fd3-b6c0-3a73-f9ba1b868c88Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he6e4e1ccg877dg475fgba85g2753f3a6cd0bText UUID: 19ca1870-1884-4b7b-9c34-70373a18f566Timeline Phase Index: 62Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ae38185a-8fd3-b6c0-3a73-f9ba1b868c88Timeline Phase Duration: 24.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: ae38185a-8fd3-b6c0-3a73-f9ba1b868c88Group Index: 0
                • +
                  467.Narrator: *You think back on the cambion you slayed a tenday ago. It carried a map with directions and blueprints for Zariel's own, private forge.*

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7d7deacc-04e7-07e3-0a6f-93954ffae974Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hfa415cfcg8d23g444egb567g3fddd9ba0ec7Text UUID: 8d20f615-aa76-48df-a2cf-1dc3d5be4b81Group ID: ae38185a-8fd3-b6c0-3a73-f9ba1b868c88Group Index: 1
                  • +
                    667.Narrator: *The current plan: sneak in, grab a smith, and force him to repair or replace your heart so you can live outside Avernus.*EPI_Epilogue_Wyll_HasMet

                        235.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Fuck yeah, that's my girl!

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3fbad87d-a2f3-2418-bee6-8b05e53330faSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1223c6e4ge1c7g4489g8dacg01fd4d263c16Text UUID: fbd4d2f4-9162-4050-87a4-2fa1a2bf813eTimeline Phase Index: 284Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3fbad87d-a2f3-2418-bee6-8b05e53330faTimeline Phase Duration: 11.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 3fbad87d-a2f3-2418-bee6-8b05e53330faGroup Index: 0
                        • +
                          87.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh shit - I'm starting to pick up your bad habits. Well, fuck it. In for a coin, in for a coffer.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1911e418-e337-c810-d39a-75c42703ba64Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h93036b55g8cf7g4378g9649g44a25c4adbc2Text UUID: 8db9e22e-7d72-4a6f-9cab-d339c545e236Group ID: 3fbad87d-a2f3-2418-bee6-8b05e53330faGroup Index: 1
                          • +
                            817.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Just think - if those blueprints are right, we can fix your heart up once and for all.!ORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Global
                            • ORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora {5b449630-ebb4-3afc-6fd2-29bfaa79600a} = False

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d6717a49-52b2-93b8-0500-0931d9f4ca93Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h13eb1975g0460g4b74g8bc0gc9c5a8a686cdText UUID: 8b433566-ec62-443a-ab19-53635c0dc2e3Timeline Phase Index: 180Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d6717a49-52b2-93b8-0500-0931d9f4ca93Timeline Phase Duration: 15.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: d6717a49-52b2-93b8-0500-0931d9f4ca93Group Index: 0
                            • +
                              890.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Imagine swimming in the Chionthar again, travelling cobblestone roads, setting our heads on down pillows.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e93e1b67-a423-80b0-50cd-b0e5caf4d9cbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: heba116f3gb2a0g4bbcg9030gafdd0ec88bfcText UUID: 55a0ced0-8442-4dba-b311-c42e54aee63cGroup ID: d6717a49-52b2-93b8-0500-0931d9f4ca93Group Index: 1
                              • +
                                111.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Well - how about we put the hunt out of our minds for now? The night's young. You shouldn't go wasting it.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 229927b1-dd7d-ac41-7758-e9583cb2ae8eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb93f25bagcfa6g481fg9f89g5811864bb7ebText UUID: a0718b1d-a0e3-44d3-bf07-bdd7c5349452Timeline Phase Index: 271Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 229927b1-dd7d-ac41-7758-e9583cb2ae8eTimeline Phase Duration: 7.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                                • +
                                  588.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Or wasting any of the wine, for that matter. I plan on downing half a bottle myself. Oops - did I say half a bottle? I meant half a dozen.ORI_State_PartneredWithWyll

                                  • •
                                    713.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh - and before you saunter off: I love you. Hasn't changed, never will. [End]note: Wyll blows a kiss at end of line

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ba07983a-e6a1-2635-e20b-0acd189ada6eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h63a9f48agad28g4a76ga3efgd658fb5b6b88Text UUID: 300d8cce-cefe-4b67-a8b0-2df86accc06eTimeline Phase Index: 389Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ba07983a-e6a1-2635-e20b-0acd189ada6eTimeline Phase Duration: 9.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True

                          • +
                            757.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Just think - if that forge map is real, we won't just be able to fix up your heart, we could reverse engineer my stone eye.ORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Global
                            • ORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora {5b449630-ebb4-3afc-6fd2-29bfaa79600a} = True

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c4a694ed-2d72-bd60-831b-cbd717effdfbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2dac7b28gd343g47acg84c0ge58fa012bcc0Text UUID: 5c228b73-a3db-4fd3-b303-e4ed368c655bTimeline Phase Index: 261Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c4a694ed-2d72-bd60-831b-cbd717effdfbTimeline Phase Duration: 18.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: c4a694ed-2d72-bd60-831b-cbd717effdfbGroup Index: 0
                            • +
                              6.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It always led Mizora to me - let's see if we can make it take us to her. It's past time for her old pet to sink in his fangs.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0188af79-1460-8d7c-9d84-c7342223964aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h59e0ba99gb025g4842g8ed7g3e6f4469b5aeText UUID: e8af2372-3946-4a5a-8b32-fc566ce24c98Group ID: c4a694ed-2d72-bd60-831b-cbd717effdfbGroup Index: 1
                              • See Node 111 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Well - how about we put the hunt out of our minds for now? The night's young. You shouldn't go wasting it.
                    • +

                        636.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Who needs hope, when we've got your axe and your courage?

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a5876112-9873-9c6c-e392-1a6dd23270bbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hbe274537g52adg480bga577g802f76c58ae7Text UUID: c261d9ca-980a-4930-938f-ea361f62ecd4Timeline Phase Index: 41Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a5876112-9873-9c6c-e392-1a6dd23270bbTimeline Phase Duration: 3.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • +
                          766.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And not to pat myself too hard on the back, but I'm not such a bad ranger if I do say so myself.!CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                          • +
                            406.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But we can't pass up the chance, Karlach. Just imagine - swimming in the Chionthar again, travelling cobblestone roads, setting our heads on down pillows.!ORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora

                        126.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So what if it is? All of Avernus is a trap. One false move, you slip into the Styx, and poof - there go your memories.

                        851.Origin_Intro_Wyll: That's my Karlach. Loyal to a fault.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e0b9cfd7-c4a5-e829-599a-385ec02a0ba9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc093d39fge118g4a7fg8a1dg72b2454849eeText UUID: 61559205-184e-4b36-b981-4d767b560910Timeline Phase Index: 146Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e0b9cfd7-c4a5-e829-599a-385ec02a0ba9Timeline Phase Duration: 12.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: e0b9cfd7-c4a5-e829-599a-385ec02a0ba9Group Index: 0

                          921.Origin_Intro_Wyll: If those blueprints work, we won't just be able to fix up your heart - we could reverse engineer my stone eye.

          • +
            854.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Reminds me of the Wilden Oak. The oldest and most storied tree in all of the Sword Coast.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e0ef50f9-fe0f-ca89-d0fa-802aeffb41aeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h93844c6cg22e9g4364gb209gf0896bc166e1Text UUID: 39da3d84-a5de-41ad-827d-8acadb0ec102Timeline Phase Index: 192Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e0ef50f9-fe0f-ca89-d0fa-802aeffb41aeTimeline Phase Duration: 6.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • +
              729.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I used to climb it when father's eye was turned elsewhere - daydream of the legends it might tell, if I listened close enough.!CAMP_Wyll_Act3Romance_Event_Began

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Global
              • CAMP_Wyll_Act3Romance_Event_Began {cb51446f-3a3e-62e7-00ee-0484f90f64b7} = False

              Metadata

              • +
                396.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But none of those legends I imagined were as spectacular as the ones we're writing for ourselves.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 691b80f4-e011-cca8-fbeb-021242834d56Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf818e944g4523g418fgb39fg2bb358c6febaText UUID: 045f12e1-da06-4f56-8d3d-5a581c38c48fGroup ID: be98ec8d-7bdf-8132-363e-1470b8bc6635Group Index: 1
                • +
                  400.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You've felled enough cambions to build a fortress with their horns.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6a001e9e-523c-d4e1-81f6-b72c9924c5d1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h8b8af0e1gdbd2g4270g9dcbg80cc87c31981Text UUID: a7ddc871-41ed-4232-a0bc-dce40d3f0bc4Group ID: be98ec8d-7bdf-8132-363e-1470b8bc6635Group Index: 2
                  • See Node 672 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Who would've thought that just one of them held the key to escaping Avernus for good?

          134.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And no rancid rancid devil-blood clogging our noses, either. I'm sure you've spilled enough of it to flood the Great Avernus Road.

          Metadata

          152.Origin_Intro_Wyll: By the good gods, how bad do I reek?note: Wyll sniffs his armpit at end of line, then lowers it back into position.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 29ec0f7a-a869-6160-eb01-60be5f0a5632Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h11482443g3967g4d98g8fc1g6bd756dc89ceText UUID: 8dc297ad-8b7a-4cdc-8baa-d8a0ec723837Timeline Phase Index: 204Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 29ec0f7a-a869-6160-eb01-60be5f0a5632Timeline Phase Duration: 3.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            95.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Shit - dried devils' blood. Stinks like a skunk squatting in an aboleth's corpse.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1afe4633-141c-1931-ceff-5f5f06486d88Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3c2498d0g6200g4ea0g8e4bg7abf25a1a4b3Text UUID: 2ea7b29b-6444-4ebe-9f55-850f3016a01dTimeline Phase Index: 280Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1afe4633-141c-1931-ceff-5f5f06486d88Timeline Phase Duration: 8.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • +
              502.Origin_Intro_Wyll: No wonder. We've felled enough cambions to build a fortress with their horns.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 850f9073-b1ac-3079-c558-a453a771d43bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd44f1a8bgd07bg4b29g85e7gb8c506c44092Text UUID: 4fceb578-4219-4baa-a617-09dd754fe12eTimeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 850f9073-b1ac-3079-c558-a453a771d43bTimeline Phase Duration: 5.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

      • +
        759.Narrator: *To your relief, your projection holds. It took a dozen gishes' talents, a few stolen psi crystals, and two tendays of effort to conjure it.*

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c5065730-4f15-5f12-ba40-ba2780a164f2Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h0bb233bbg1933g4cacgb9ceg6f759201043dText UUID: da7cde3c-3333-4d1f-8600-af2aa9c1b665Timeline Phase Index: 167Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c5065730-4f15-5f12-ba40-ba2780a164f2Timeline Phase Duration: 10.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • +
          788.Narrator: *You can touch, taste, and talk; but your fleshly body is in Limbo, the home of the mystical githzerai. Once, the githzerai were one with the githyanki - until bloody civil war severed the gith species.*

          Text

          *You can touch, taste, and talk; but your fleshly body is in Limbo, the home of the mystical githzerai. Once, the githzerai were one with the githyanki - until bloody civil war severed the gith species.*
          h813c6745gd775g4a38gb5dbg8d045312aa53 | bf1ee9d1-c70d-430e-bd2f-ab82c1612066 | stub

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ce033556-5c11-3c1a-6f2b-743661238000Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h813c6745gd775g4a38gb5dbg8d045312aa53Text UUID: bf1ee9d1-c70d-430e-bd2f-ab82c1612066Timeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ce033556-5c11-3c1a-6f2b-743661238000Timeline Phase Duration: 17.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            912.Narrator: *The githzerai god-king, Menyar-Ag-Gith, sent word through the cosmos. He knows of your rebellion - and he's agreed to parley.*

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee53728c-da5c-8eb6-f25f-4806a384c9c8Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h78752b7dg61c0g4874gac82g60c1da7e26deText UUID: a85685be-9096-4b51-8657-05496f0ab12fTimeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ee53728c-da5c-8eb6-f25f-4806a384c9c8Timeline Phase Duration: 11.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • +
              968.Narrator: *Should the githzerai join you, you could vanquish Vlaakith in a red dragon's blink.*

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fd554027-c344-9a57-f948-d166c5a479feSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h02e735e4gc4feg4fdcgb20fg9511fc80c2adText UUID: cdfc6845-d364-4bab-be8d-f070310df7a8Timeline Phase Index: 129Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fd554027-c344-9a57-f948-d166c5a479feTimeline Phase Duration: 6.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • +
                630.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Lae'zel. I knew you'd find a way.

                Metadata

                      761.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Limbo - realm of the githzerai? Then the rebellion's taken you far from the Astral.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c6a2b0d5-c72b-ad65-af99-2cced3bc4c72Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h46bdd59ag898fg44ddgb1acg63b4ed136129Text UUID: ee10c2b9-2b3d-4468-a0d6-e431eb63b511Timeline Phase Index: 157Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c6a2b0d5-c72b-ad65-af99-2cced3bc4c72Timeline Phase Duration: 6.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        357.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm proud of you, you know. It can't have been easy to turn your back on the lich you called queen.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5ffcf86f-f46d-7066-ec16-14b1c8d8ef12Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h77d15089g0987g4ccfgb7cag48b7b6e4f5e1Text UUID: 0e1e62ec-1c1a-4c8d-a346-76e454860dc3Timeline Phase Index: 207Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5ffcf86f-f46d-7066-ec16-14b1c8d8ef12Timeline Phase Duration: 22.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 5ffcf86f-f46d-7066-ec16-14b1c8d8ef12Group Index: 0
                        • +
                          882.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I imagine you've been cracking kith'raki heads across every plane. Mind you, you're not the only one who's been piling up corpses.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e6abf92c-4b9b-6ecc-0d76-8ce0b39bd74cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h18dd1f15ge620g4580gb9cfgedde24bf084dText UUID: fa722a94-e6f6-4bec-b5b8-8568176fe28bGroup ID: 5ffcf86f-f46d-7066-ec16-14b1c8d8ef12Group Index: 1
                          • +
                            149.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Karlach and I have felled enough cambions to build a fortress with their horns.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 29795a55-6848-baa7-4231-41447cf8ec50Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb3c2c769g0411g468egbbb5gb801be914735Text UUID: 80838912-3ffd-480b-bf11-a7b57302172dGroup ID: 5ffcf86f-f46d-7066-ec16-14b1c8d8ef12Group Index: 2
                            • +
                              563.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Who would have thought that just one of those fiends held the key to escaping Avernus for good?

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 92552f58-5e49-f3a3-1cf5-d91f6fd4a3efSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h98d6db21gc47dg4383g927dgc73c4aa57808Text UUID: b3fb2797-b33a-43cd-8fab-103a6708b8efTimeline Phase Index: 19Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 92552f58-5e49-f3a3-1cf5-d91f6fd4a3efTimeline Phase Duration: 5.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • +
                                304.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And get this: If those blueprints we found work, I could reverse engineer my stone eye.                                       850.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I've missed you too. You were always a fighter, in every sense of the word.Lae'zelShadowheartAstarionKarlach

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      ruletagtype rule
                                      • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                      • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                      • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}

                                      Text

                                      Variant 1

                                      combine=0
                                      • Lae'zel
                                      I've missed you too. You were always a fighter, in every sense of the word.
                                      h415d33d9g8db2g4a1dgbb06ga9002bc2d6f2 | 36234c1f-405c-4efe-880e-e43c0ed1e28f | stub

                                      Variant 2

                                      combine=0
                                      • Shadowheart
                                      I've missed you too. You showed me that even in one who walks in the shadows might still shine her own light.
                                      h58f30c3dg52c0g48cfg82ecged3389cb0d18 | f19184b4-8038-43f8-bb76-72e2352b2131 | stub

                                      Variant 3

                                      combine=0
                                      • Astarion
                                      I've missed you too. And your cunning tongue, of course. And did I mention your hair? I might have missed that most of all.
                                      habb9dfadgc0bdg4e38ga33fg746ab9780253 | d4ad5ee2-090e-40e7-80e8-0afd29ab49dd | stub

                                      Variant 4

                                      combine=0
                                      • Karlach
                                      I've missed you too, Karlach. The most generous spirit, the fiercest heart. Diamond and cinder, forged into a precious treasure all on its own.
                                      h66e15f30g3725g4358ga09egebaaa523a037 | 5e886bc7-6abd-4d87-8b92-4be4d7efaf04 | stub

                                      Variant 5

                                      I've missed you too. The rush of battles we fought, the heart-to-hearts, the nights around the fire. The comfort of knowing I didn't face the unknown alone.
                                      he9098acag8796g4d66gbc2bgc45a7cc525f5 | 3365a1e9-1425-434b-9e63-03178c776777 | stub

                                      Metadata

                                        976.Origin_Intro_Wyll: If I had to do it all over again - and I'd rather not, to be clear! - I can't imagine not having you at my side.

                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0b47dd25-4df2-7a82-458b-58f796bbc869Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: haa6d6b89g1585g438ag91f2g43b784e5ffa5Text 1 UUID: eb4bf445-2b71-4e50-a118-5df1b83190c8Text 2 Handle: hb8169465gcebfg4c00gaacege6f96b5fe7d8Text 2 UUID: 034bb4ae-29d2-4882-8187-9fab800303a8Show Once: True
                                    • +
                                      750.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I think the splinters I made out of the last bone devil I saw speak for themselves.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c364601a-58ee-3db6-89d3-72afc8bafc80Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he1cdfc09g171bg4bd2g8d6dg57e85565ed45Text UUID: 54051ba8-0155-464c-914b-488c1ea89066Timeline Phase Index: 38Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c364601a-58ee-3db6-89d3-72afc8bafc80Timeline Phase Duration: 12.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: c364601a-58ee-3db6-89d3-72afc8bafc80Group Index: 0
                                      • •
                                        656.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Not to pat myself too hard on the back, but I'm not such a bad ranger if I do say so myself.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aa5e816d-f999-d362-b291-c4572837403aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h4dd01b32ga2dag49a0gb3abg851fcede3f44Text UUID: a9ca35e4-10bf-4751-80c0-c0c2d58e7630Group ID: c364601a-58ee-3db6-89d3-72afc8bafc80Group Index: 1
                                  • +
                                    237.Player: How long before Mizora becomes a problem, do you think?Full-IllithidCAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPactEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                    • +
                                      206.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She's kept me on a long leash, if you can believe it. Every target she's set me on's been a demonic intruder - tanar'ri assassins who slip into Avernus, armanites that amass near the Styx.

                                      Text

                                      She's kept me on a long leash, if you can believe it. Every target she's set me on's been a demonic intruder - tanar'ri assassins who slip into Avernus, armanites that amass near the Styx.
                                      hce604ba0gc50bg4a38gbf9fg26a670d85d70 | 889bd0bb-b2af-449c-867d-89e68dbff0c8 | stub

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 39078d58-02f1-6810-92dc-dd78910bfe2fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hce604ba0gc50bg4a38gbf9fg26a670d85d70Text UUID: 889bd0bb-b2af-449c-867d-89e68dbff0c8Timeline Phase Index: 202Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 39078d58-02f1-6810-92dc-dd78910bfe2fTimeline Phase Duration: 23.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 39078d58-02f1-6810-92dc-dd78910bfe2fGroup Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        159.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My next target's the most challenging yet, or so she says. I don't know much more, only that it's no demon - but a devil.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2bd3f997-f0ce-3942-f9f7-28216c2965ebSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h11f99029ge348g4fd2g869cgd5edb12131d5Text UUID: f878587c-400c-4f1e-995f-752499ffd718Group ID: 39078d58-02f1-6810-92dc-dd78910bfe2fGroup Index: 1
                                        • •
                                          308.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm not worried, not when you both have my back. I swear you two could scare the eyes off a beholder.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                          • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True

                                        • •
                                          953.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm not worried, not when Karlach's got my back. I swear she could scare the eyes off a beholder.

                                  • +

                                      664.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Well, that's enough hell-talk for the moment. The night's young. You shouldn't go wasting it.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aca2c754-5061-fc7a-01bb-7eecf70f3224Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h079b4502gf169g49d4g98f4ge77bba1035b1Text UUID: 1b87ee1c-105e-4648-a871-80b0a01fba4dTimeline Phase Index: 33Timeline Dialog Node UUID: aca2c754-5061-fc7a-01bb-7eecf70f3224Timeline Phase Duration: 6.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                              • +
                                207.Origin_Intro_Wyll: One of them sported a map and some blueprints. If you want all the gory details, Karlach can fill you in. But get this:ORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora!CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Global
                                • ORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora {5b449630-ebb4-3afc-6fd2-29bfaa79600a} = True
                                • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = False

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 39708c5d-7b2e-0e31-6ef3-33bb207945afSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h0e20de63gc22eg4417g8e60g464a95ff0493Text UUID: 85ce53e7-e03e-4835-bdc2-411091b1fb30Timeline Phase Index: 225Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 39708c5d-7b2e-0e31-6ef3-33bb207945afTimeline Phase Duration: 16.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 39708c5d-7b2e-0e31-6ef3-33bb207945afGroup Index: 0
                                • +
                                  923.Origin_Intro_Wyll: If those blueprints work, I could reverse engineer my stone eye. Instead of Mizora tracking me, I could track her.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f14af568-d9ae-faad-66ef-c9880c098919Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd2ca6362g1ebbg4893g838cgf553636a77f8Text UUID: 86ce8502-30ba-4f80-afa1-ecbb33578bf3Group ID: 39708c5d-7b2e-0e31-6ef3-33bb207945afGroup Index: 1
                                  • See Node 924 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) It's past time for her old pet to sink in his fangs.
                              • +
                                935.Origin_Intro_Wyll: If those blueprints work, we might be able to fix Karlach - and she might be able to go home to Faerûn.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f4a1107c-3fe7-9a85-f63d-eeaee0f9b034Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h9c8b528bg78adg401cg9683g622f84811017Text UUID: b4afc2e8-eaac-4a03-ba77-cb03dacf14b9Timeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f4a1107c-3fe7-9a85-f63d-eeaee0f9b034Timeline Phase Duration: 6.95sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                    797.Player: I'm a psionic projection. Do I look like I can smell anything?Full-Illithid

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d07694e9-404c-38c4-e50b-148faf020e44Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h53e8fbdfge299g4250gac7bg4552028dce58Text 1 UUID: 1d2081e9-e4f4-41b2-b62e-5acd490e9d0cText 2 Handle: h5ef59d3cg0986g412fga95ag9215589999a7Text 2 UUID: 7653fd0b-2a6f-41f8-b757-167400176fc9Show Once: True
                    • +
                      388.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I wager not. Well, probably for the best - I can smell only the sweet honeysuckle in the air. Karlach insists I reek with the blood of a hundred devils.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6781eedb-ff10-cc5c-9509-418cf6cf9fd2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h236c93d4g4ee1g4477gaa57gd791effb4756Text UUID: 9c4ecfe2-9cd2-46dc-9d12-c47345a9b061Timeline Phase Index: 337Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6781eedb-ff10-cc5c-9509-418cf6cf9fd2Timeline Phase Duration: 13.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • +
                        498.Origin_Intro_Wyll: No wonder. Karlach and I have felled enough cambions to build a fortress with their horns.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 847c6fce-7f2e-d948-dc9c-b00a76f5b57dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he3345a24g30acg4ff0g9ce8gcc35c31d65b4Text UUID: f5bdec41-3303-4a27-b986-be205e838287Timeline Phase Index: 92Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 847c6fce-7f2e-d948-dc9c-b00a76f5b57dTimeline Phase Duration: 6.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • See Node 563 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Who would have thought that just one of those fiends held the key to escaping Avernus for good?
                  • +
                    81.Player: Only faintly, I'm afraid. I miss the sweet scents of the Sword Coast. And I miss you.Full-Illithid

                      877.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I miss you too. I'm glad you could, er, project your way in, or however it works.

                  777.Origin_Intro_Wyll: What's the word on the rebellion? I presume you've cracked open more kith'raki heads than you could possibly count.EPI_Epilogue_Wyll_HasMet

                      542.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Then you did keep count. I should've known you would!

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8e00b397-66ad-c2e6-ffef-d92462ea02dcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf34b8450gd302g4930gb6bag0f0d3acc50bbText UUID: 04873432-d38a-4376-894f-30286dc6b21dTimeline Phase Index: 74Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8e00b397-66ad-c2e6-ffef-d92462ea02dcTimeline Phase Duration: 4.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • +
                        280.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My kill count's much lower, I fear - though I slip away for a hunt when I can. I may no longer be the Blade, but my heart is never far from the frontiers.ORI_Wyll_State_PartneredMonsterHunt

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Wyll_State_PartneredMonsterHunt {75255ca6-0fd0-8a13-b601-6fe3b624c04d} = True

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4dfc1120-ada1-b6c1-1d49-12580ca58a68Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h709766a4gf5e9g4d3dg8a78g13aad6d93f11Text UUID: 3e63d166-05a2-4483-9e7b-482fcf83bf1dTimeline Phase Index: 365Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4dfc1120-ada1-b6c1-1d49-12580ca58a68Timeline Phase Duration: 19.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 4dfc1120-ada1-b6c1-1d49-12580ca58a68Group Index: 0
                        • +
                          468.Origin_Intro_Wyll: That said, rebuilding a city requires less a sharp blade and more a politic mind.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7d8c53e8-b4c3-1795-4ec2-e5acbd54a3a4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h0990313dge57ag4dc5gb1e0gada0e0ef92daText UUID: 1ffdd443-e8a9-467f-b109-e852083cb2ffGroup ID: 4dfc1120-ada1-b6c1-1d49-12580ca58a68Group Index: 1
                          • +
                            62.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Bargains must be made, coin must change hands, tongues must be held in check.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 116553b1-88c5-c236-e503-bcfc375d781bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha7c8a6c4g7e68g4ff7ga038gd2cf366f87a9Text UUID: 3d1e6c34-c82e-4e76-b64f-ec48f52f33b2Timeline Phase Index: 265Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 116553b1-88c5-c236-e503-bcfc375d781bTimeline Phase Duration: 5.93sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                            • +
                              657.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Father leaves me to my own devices - though he's got no shortage of advice when I ask for it.CAMP_Ravengard_State_RavengardInCamp!GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated

                              Flags and Tags

                              checktype Global
                              • CAMP_Ravengard_State_RavengardInCamp {37309008-04cf-493c-8ca6-43034d331a8a} = True

                              Metadata

                              • +
                                362.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Still, I make the decisions I see fit, the ones I think will restore the city to glory. I serve only Baldur's Gate -!CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Global
                                • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = False

                                • +
                                  435.Origin_Intro_Wyll: - not a devil of the First Hell.!CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                    539.Jump to Node 417

                                  • +
                                    20.Player: I miss you so much, Wyll.END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyllEPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologram

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                    • END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyll {3b60022c-b8a5-445e-b66a-21154f9fd73b} = True
                                    • EPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologram {c26bf0f3-3d72-4bf2-b6cc-8a8c5029f656} = True

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 05799035-e709-a71b-74c4-89633fdffe8dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb1f578e6gc162g4457gb48agf32e5c06c6a2Text UUID: 2970b398-1b43-4064-9b2b-68569500bab0Show Once: True
                                    • +
                                      873.Origin_Intro_Wyll: By day, I bargain with dusty bureaucrats and fuss over documents that would make a devil blush. By night, I sleep alone, longing for your touch.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e3c00a1f-eeca-5fca-897e-b81a957a4df5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h12117fefg7800g4684ga804g902061a6ccc1Text UUID: d8468a2b-1b91-48eb-a6da-a2e7691b03e7Timeline Phase Index: 117Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e3c00a1f-eeca-5fca-897e-b81a957a4df5Timeline Phase Duration: 11.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                      • +
                                        101.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But I love you no less now than ever. And I love that you are fighting for your people.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1f2860db-a2ae-e97e-a3b6-a682e140b6b7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h918928cdg92a0g4979g9ca2ge0e5c2515129Text UUID: d654d4ea-0220-4144-9319-88267285add1Timeline Phase Index: 276Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1f2860db-a2ae-e97e-a3b6-a682e140b6b7Timeline Phase Duration: 6.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • +
                                          955.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I will wait for you, I promise - no matter how many sunsets pass. You are my heart.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa71a95d-d386-3c17-01fc-9f30c94c587fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6424e03ag3f55g4478gb21dg2567d5c85448Text UUID: 9f5aa427-2b7b-4b55-98c0-a143b34de90cTimeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fa71a95d-d386-3c17-01fc-9f30c94c587fTimeline Phase Duration: 8.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                          • +
                                            577.Player: And you are mine. I'll join you in Baldur's Gate as soon as I can.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 95bbb632-d535-1505-e7b9-21c3cf7697ebSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h741d5e02gdee2g429eg98dfgc83cedf77d4eText UUID: 823cf9df-03e1-415f-8906-aeb2d5a7f52fShow Once: True
                                            • +
                                              161.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Nothing could make me happier. Gods, what a treasure you are.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2c9d87af-4884-17fd-70f9-e2c753f84bd8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfa574a56gfb3ag4b61ga05dg9f9940f4faa8Text UUID: 572a2efa-562c-4468-a266-696638363a4aTimeline Phase Index: 201Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2c9d87af-4884-17fd-70f9-e2c753f84bd8Timeline Phase Duration: 5.85sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                              • •
                                                629.Jump to Node 435

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: JumpUUID: a2c17b60-fb20-59de-3cfd-c9ca1905e5e4Jump Target: Node 435 (736f58f3-f0ed-bb10-5788-57d22edcebc3)Jump Target Point: 2
                                          • +
                                            536.Player: My beautiful man. You've always been such a softie.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8cdc8a75-bf6d-c919-4a44-f0897a7b8ccfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hce6cb8feg406fg4720gbb22g29244827e5e8Text UUID: 32c1133d-c088-4ea3-b75e-dd6b6b5b5e00Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              862.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Not always. But once I met you, well - love has a way of tempering a blade's edges.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e232b10c-82f2-fcba-56c2-d5e39d566719Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h521fc51dgfb7bg4e04gbbc7g9db5cac3b944Text UUID: e76a0f3f-6433-4c20-bbbe-a42f9dda18d7Timeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e232b10c-82f2-fcba-56c2-d5e39d566719Timeline Phase Duration: 7.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                              • See Node 629 Jump to Node 435
                                          • +
                                            77.Player: It could be a while, you know. Can you really wait that long?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 16e9057e-056c-8314-c41c-92b14343eb2bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h42d2dbaaga6e8g4086gafa6gdcd394151030Text UUID: 7ded6f4b-555c-4c80-9d38-3279e7537954Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              193.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'll wait until the hot Hells freeze over and the cold Hells melt away. Let forever pass, if it must. Time itself can't keep us apart.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 35fdb7fd-0502-9004-7d84-7f575e14a6c8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h32a5a1ecg602eg4fd1ga544gb4d72b744428Text UUID: fdcbb332-f3c7-4a40-becc-4be29b751aefTimeline Phase Index: 235Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 35fdb7fd-0502-9004-7d84-7f575e14a6c8Timeline Phase Duration: 10.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                              • See Node 629 Jump to Node 435
                                      • +
                                        58.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But I love you no less now than ever. And I love that you devoted your talents to such a dear friend.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 104d4db9-f436-bdcf-334c-064ca469fa2cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hde566343gbcc0g4f4egb718g1af9209e0cbdText UUID: f8de859c-fd07-4eed-a646-5d2c788c48dfTimeline Phase Index: 244Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 104d4db9-f436-bdcf-334c-064ca469fa2cTimeline Phase Duration: 6.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • See Node 955 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) I will wait for you, I promise - no matter how many sunsets pass. You are my heart.
                                  • +
                                    333.Player: I miss you so much, Wyll.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellEND_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyll

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    • See Node 873 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) By day, I bargain with dusty bureaucrats and fuss over documents that would make a devil blush. By night, I sleep alone, longing for your touch.
                                  • +

                                    • +
                                      315.Origin_Intro_Wyll: He appeared at the family home the day after the Absolute fell. Confused, dishevelled - but unharmed.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 579e6257-4dfb-ea8d-3fc2-4db0d0a3ce89Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc3825e51g0acfg4be5g8a28g6f31fb98debbText UUID: dcc1b80c-78c2-476e-b2f5-c8d78cb0060aTimeline Phase Index: 370Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 579e6257-4dfb-ea8d-3fc2-4db0d0a3ce89Timeline Phase Duration: 19.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 579e6257-4dfb-ea8d-3fc2-4db0d0a3ce89Group Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        410.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I told him the truth of things. Of the pact, of the tadpoles - all of it. And for the first time in seven years, I felt his embrace.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c066b40-b896-c442-2819-341fdd707657Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7ee1031fg84cdg499agba8ag971f2b8fc3caText UUID: 78e5ae5c-c583-4042-bedf-dc3a593ece3aGroup ID: 579e6257-4dfb-ea8d-3fc2-4db0d0a3ce89Group Index: 1
                                        • •

                                          782.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Now he's back in his element - commanding the Flaming Fist with as brave a heart as ever, and with nary a scolding or lashing.!EPI_Epilogue_Wyll_FlamingFistEPI_Epilogue_Wyll_FlamingFist

                                      • +
                                        450.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Florrick, bless her soul, convinced him to withhold the lashings and scoldings, though I know he was tempted.

                                        Metadata

                                    893.Player: It's good to see you doing so well, Wyll. You always were my hero, and now you're rebuilding the city I love.Full-IllithidKarlach

                                    • +
                                      793.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I've had more than a few challenges, given the horns sprouting from my head.Wyll's Fiendish Form

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      checktype Tag | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Wyll
                                      • Wyll's Fiendish Form {5e844f0e-d822-4210-a28e-6af149a7bd4b} = True

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cfb9431f-79ac-a619-9859-a2786e48bf0dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h601d1c68gad6cg4f82g875dg717dd7971a3bText UUID: f61942d0-5200-45ce-a675-695cd7e34f01Timeline Phase Index: 190Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cfb9431f-79ac-a619-9859-a2786e48bf0dTimeline Phase Duration: 5.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                      • +
                                        354.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The people know me as one of the champions who saved their beloved city. They know Ravengard blood flows through my veins.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f42df52-4308-7e9d-27fa-4d8060e48cfeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he21b2dceg5a2ag4633g88ddga09ffbd28954Text UUID: 2209a600-c3be-4180-8c91-29a9a150ceeeTimeline Phase Index: 303Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5f42df52-4308-7e9d-27fa-4d8060e48cfeTimeline Phase Duration: 7.93sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • +
                                          221.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The patriars, the aristocracy, the councils of Waterdeep and Amn? Their arms aren't so wide open.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3bcada8f-a58d-82d8-7afa-004180647646Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7c8780cdgdce1g4e33g9de2g8a92cebc6d3bText UUID: 5a117c2a-6aac-4d7d-87cd-975b9c077521Timeline Phase Index: 291Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3bcada8f-a58d-82d8-7afa-004180647646Timeline Phase Duration: 6.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • +
                                            446.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Still, there's no friction that can't be greased with a sly promise or a proposition.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 775d61a7-4827-fe34-9324-a3bfb9c6fb33Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf82f3c7fg7c1eg4388gb1e6g864d7ba1e7deText UUID: 1a768b1e-baa3-4e53-9c6e-c7244f12c4daTimeline Phase Index: 69Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 775d61a7-4827-fe34-9324-a3bfb9c6fb33Timeline Phase Duration: 6.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                            • +

                                              Variant 1

                                              combine=0
                                              • Full-Illithid
                                              What's happened to Baldur's Gate's Council of Four?

                                              Variant 2

                                              What's happened to Baldur's Gate's Council of Four?

                                              • +
                                                646.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Disbanded, to be formed anew.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8908819-96e5-031f-d3a1-db888f8f0ea6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he9bfc48cg24ebg467ag9ee1gd8933dd3e9eaText UUID: 1ef415b5-3242-46ab-933a-bccd4e786d96Timeline Phase Index: 245Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a8908819-96e5-031f-d3a1-db888f8f0ea6Timeline Phase Duration: 15.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: a8908819-96e5-031f-d3a1-db888f8f0ea6Group Index: 0
                                                • +
                                                  57.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I don't expect a soldier or street-sweeper to see through the schemes of a tyrant like Gortash.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0fd17632-b4a7-b02b-86a8-d38cfe7ba5ecSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h70151b59g6b35g493egaf11gd583a5f199dfText UUID: 20f2f094-16ce-4db9-ae97-a9dac2559c82Group ID: a8908819-96e5-031f-d3a1-db888f8f0ea6Group Index: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    643.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But the city's lords and ladies were all too eager to abandon their oaths and bend the knee.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a7998e81-030c-d00d-4d01-0eb634e9c1aaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6b98ca3bgf849g4e62ga116gc9a0289b3d09Text UUID: 150065d7-2547-4365-ac78-e9aff5653d46Group ID: a8908819-96e5-031f-d3a1-db888f8f0ea6Group Index: 2
                                                    • +
                                                      48.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My father, Ulder Ravengard, is now Grand Duke of the Triad, Keeper of the Fist.!GLO_Ravengard_State_DefeatedEPI_Epilogue_Wyll_FatherCouncil

                                                      • +

                                                        • +
                                                          351.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And I am Wyll Ravengard, Grand Duke of the Wyrm, Heart of the Gate.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f01c511-689b-741b-bd0b-d08bc100a286Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h9137c2ebg3d12g415dg8918gf80ed0f301f7Text UUID: 92a94969-1ee3-456c-979b-84aed2c48a00Timeline Phase Index: 304Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5f01c511-689b-741b-bd0b-d08bc100a286Timeline Phase Duration: 21.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 5f01c511-689b-741b-bd0b-d08bc100a286Group Index: 0
                                                          • +
                                                            783.Origin_Intro_Wyll: We will yet be Four. Until such time - and after - we will enact the will of the people's Parliament.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cc65c2b8-c39e-ff24-3784-123ee0ec6c83Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h09296520gb09cg45a9gba22g05603f61213bText UUID: 527d9628-74d4-4674-a799-3bcfefd50f79Group ID: 5f01c511-689b-741b-bd0b-d08bc100a286Group Index: 1
                                                            • •
                                                              647.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Baldur's Gate is nothing without its citizens, both in the Upper and Lower. Our duty is to them, and only them.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8d93871-50ac-8624-2a10-d48abfb4fec8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc4f73085gac9cg4717gacf8gd4652a4d612fText UUID: 4bcbc257-e37b-46a1-9b33-c4de29da3cccGroup ID: 5f01c511-689b-741b-bd0b-d08bc100a286Group Index: 2
                                                      • +

                                              • +
                                                506.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I do.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 863299ee-e2ee-d3d1-0d78-824a6159d85cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h501944aag2cdeg44d7g8fa4g810adfddadb9Text UUID: b644debf-a7fc-47db-8a85-23ae7645a182Timeline Phase Index: 88Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 863299ee-e2ee-d3d1-0d78-824a6159d85cTimeline Phase Duration: 1.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • +
                                                  810.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The Jewel of the Coast will shine ever bright, welcoming the weak and the weary, from wherever they hail.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3c2f784-652a-b6c8-6e52-d3041ca2ffa1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb0f2464ag29f2g48b6g81d3g628ca24e18faText UUID: 267713f3-3671-447a-9697-d7a54727d4a5Timeline Phase Index: 183Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d3c2f784-652a-b6c8-6e52-d3041ca2ffa1Timeline Phase Duration: 7.28sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    632.Origin_Intro_Wyll: We are building new housing - not just shanties, but homes where families can rest their heads, plant gardens, pursue happiness.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a34f71d9-2960-39e4-2649-f012fe0a8d93Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdb676e4dge9eag4aa2g8f17g4d10b6d48d5aText UUID: 6c1f9a91-2c56-42d2-bc95-b6d3ab6f1c7aTimeline Phase Index: 240Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a34f71d9-2960-39e4-2649-f012fe0a8d93Timeline Phase Duration: 21.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: a34f71d9-2960-39e4-2649-f012fe0a8d93Group Index: 0
                                                    • +
                                                      200.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Amazing, what can be done when Parliament and the Council pressure the upper city elites to open their coffers.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 378f9ff1-6fbc-97d3-96c7-66a48df8b251Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: had6e4f62gac89g47c5g9fd3g5d824602b33cText UUID: 88d88ded-31f4-4ed2-ad31-0042722097b7Group ID: a34f71d9-2960-39e4-2649-f012fe0a8d93Group Index: 1
                                                      • •
                                                        238.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm sure the Silvershields can make do without a few more jewelled crowns.

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3fd0926e-58d4-b1fb-ddf9-a3278193dae1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd5ea462fg66e3g4c2cgbea1g62644d4b3ccfText UUID: 3c2d5ee6-970a-4e40-a49f-464ff16c1935Group ID: a34f71d9-2960-39e4-2649-f012fe0a8d93Group Index: 2
                                            • +

                                              • +
                                                219.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I do. Unlike your Sharrans, I strive to live in the light.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3b9cd8f5-cb49-e5d2-a2c9-ec2bf39ade8dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h57a863bag27b6g44b7g97a3ge88951376992Text UUID: 7884b757-f99b-4699-99ce-476987248585Timeline Phase Index: 220Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3b9cd8f5-cb49-e5d2-a2c9-ec2bf39ade8dTimeline Phase Duration: 5.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • See Node 632 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) We are building new housing - not just shanties, but homes where families can rest their heads, plant gardens, pursue happiness.
                                            • +
                                              23.Player: When we first arrived at the city, refugees were swarming the bridge. I understand things have changed.Full-Illithid!ShadowheartEPI_Epilogue_Wyll_Refugees

                                              • +
                                                944.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Father's back in his element - commanding the Flaming Fist with as brave a heart as ever, and delivered them nary a scolding nor lashing.!GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Global
                                                • GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated {7bb624ef-09cb-4e55-b035-832c05427a61} = False

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f627d8b6-546a-689e-57a0-1932feecefc6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdd1d0c94g0a20g465egb370g5bc58e1a2f07Text UUID: edab318b-7f56-4ba7-8c3e-fd7ab83deef2Timeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f627d8b6-546a-689e-57a0-1932feecefc6Timeline Phase Duration: 8.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • +
                                                  486.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The likes of Gortash can bend people's minds with a few chosen words, no tadpole needed.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 822e6a01-9891-1e7f-91f5-d698c746aef4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h03572f07gda7dg4886gac65gd0744fca2d27Text UUID: 8113cb80-c6b0-4811-8bad-8d544ea1d1beTimeline Phase Index: 52Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 822e6a01-9891-1e7f-91f5-d698c746aef4Timeline Phase Duration: 6.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    768.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Bane's Chosen primed the Fist for a war they weren't meant to win. He convinced them there was an assassin hiding in every shadow, that cruelty was the correct answer to crisis.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c73c93f6-85a7-37d7-bccb-cd263ebb649dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfd9017bbg4a56g43dcgbd51g0600240a7eaaText UUID: f2a5ed87-fe63-4168-b114-69b8f9cb8fbfTimeline Phase Index: 153Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c73c93f6-85a7-37d7-bccb-cd263ebb649dTimeline Phase Duration: 11.06sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      888.Origin_Intro_Wyll: With a few exceptions, Father's pardoned every last Fist. 'If my forgiveness not be Tyr's will, so be it. I shall forgive them all the same.' His words, not mine.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e7bdc658-764a-07b5-19a6-f9ca8cbafde9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h65e95a52gbf46g4c5bgbe4dg74412bc36e01Text UUID: 9b0c130b-8fec-4b4e-b29e-3a5a215c0a74Timeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e7bdc658-764a-07b5-19a6-f9ca8cbafde9Timeline Phase Duration: 14.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                      • +
                                                        875.Origin_Intro_Wyll: He still believes in the bow and the blade. But with Florrick's help, he's teaching the Fist a new lesson:WYR_WyrmRockPrison_State_FlorrickEscaped!GLO_Florrick_State_PermaDefeated

                                                    • +
                                                      312.Origin_Intro_Wyll: With a few exceptions, Florrick's pardoned every last Fist. 'I will not make them drink the poison of my own resentment.' Her words, not mine.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 571bf24b-e452-cea7-b5d1-142f29a9cdf1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha115f97ag3837g47c2g83d3gcf8560685e9cText UUID: d3515e1b-f20d-4000-a110-99aaab6d28ffTimeline Phase Index: 373Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 571bf24b-e452-cea7-b5d1-142f29a9cdf1Timeline Phase Duration: 10.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                              • +
                                                918.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I've entrusted the Fist to Cordula Eltan. Who better than a descendant of its founder to guide them?!LOW_FlorrickFightFallback_State_EltanDefeatedGLO_Florrick_State_PermaDefeated

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f042174f-a0ad-ab75-11f0-67783ca26f21Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7e3bcbd2g212dg4610g89a6g6126c9496e58Text UUID: 7088b8bf-fc92-47c7-aba3-acc31cb44d62Timeline Phase Index: 9Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f042174f-a0ad-ab75-11f0-67783ca26f21Timeline Phase Duration: 16.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: f042174f-a0ad-ab75-11f0-67783ca26f21Group Index: 0
                                                • +
                                                  590.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Given the atrocities the Fist committed under Gortash, I expected her to thrash every last one. But she didn't do so much as scold them.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 99fcae5f-5531-509a-4e5a-a46c217b6302Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h56d59329g7875g4db5g9d11g893fc5bdf7d1Text UUID: b41609c7-5c0e-4d70-934b-a89b5671f36aGroup ID: f042174f-a0ad-ab75-11f0-67783ca26f21Group Index: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    812.No Speaker: Alias to Node 313
                                                    • +
                                                      313.Origin_Intro_Wyll: With a few exceptions, Eltan's pardoned every last Fist. 'Gortash led the parched Fist to Bane's bloody well. I refuse to punish the thirsty for drinking from it.' Her words, not mine.

                                                      Text

                                                      With a few exceptions, Eltan's pardoned every last Fist. 'Gortash led the parched Fist to Bane's bloody well. I refuse to punish the thirsty for drinking from it.' Her words, not mine.

                                                      • See Node 703 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Like my father, she believes in the bow and the blade. But she's teaching the Fist a new lesson:
                                              • +
                                                317.Origin_Intro_Wyll: They've fallen under my command for the time being.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 57c91fa6-4b52-bcb0-3a73-9c7ca6479f8bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb23860f1gef4cg4d7egbfc3g68a0b90ff5feText UUID: 0628191c-4e8c-4b2a-8d10-5e191cfaaae0Timeline Phase Index: 368Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 57c91fa6-4b52-bcb0-3a73-9c7ca6479f8bTimeline Phase Duration: 12.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 57c91fa6-4b52-bcb0-3a73-9c7ca6479f8bGroup Index: 0
                                                • +
                                                  876.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I considered thrashing every last one of them for the fears they stoked in Gortash's name. But I didn't have the heart for so much as a scolding.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e4629673-deea-a670-d890-6dd23226cd26Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h9a509958g2580g4277g9742g837dc285e031Text UUID: 839bc1a6-1baf-480f-ab56-a559fa25f95fGroup ID: 57c91fa6-4b52-bcb0-3a73-9c7ca6479f8bGroup Index: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    556.No Speaker: Alias to Node 278
                                                    • +
                                                      278.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So I pardoned every last one. Gortash led the parched Fist to Bane's bloody well. I refuse to punish the thirsty for drinking from it

                                    • +
                                      784.Origin_Intro_Wyll: For the good, I like to think. Brick by brick, stone by stone, it's started to heal. Though I've met my fair share of challenges.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ccdc0ac1-7a90-bfbb-42a1-669dfd7bb1f1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdea72838g7376g44efga819gdcb28e833636Text UUID: 44c620d5-6b47-4150-9a26-21f5a9bbb97dTimeline Phase Index: 168Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ccdc0ac1-7a90-bfbb-42a1-669dfd7bb1f1Timeline Phase Duration: 10.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                      • See Node 354 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) The people know me as one of the champions who saved their beloved city. They know Ravengard blood flows through my veins.
                                  • +

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9e661c4d-da05-763b-299a-35b5f7f13f16Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hf84e50f9g21bdg49f8g8373g5b9823c456c4Text 1 UUID: d228124f-441e-4084-8923-f61674063f8dText 2 Handle: h44ae9198g0c52g48b5g9016gf3f929457230Text 2 UUID: 02dcd401-9a50-4500-b32a-6de60f87826aShow Once: True
                                    • See Node 793 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) I've had more than a few challenges, given the horns sprouting from my head.
                                    • See Node 784 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) For the good, I like to think. Brick by brick, stone by stone, it's started to heal. Though I've met my fair share of challenges.
                                  • +

                                    • +
                                      321.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I've felt your gaze. Whenever a chill passes through me, I know Shar's favoured is close.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 584660d3-2f9d-3600-53aa-c8d7e03d10c4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1ec37e9bgc88ag47d7g8e62g303c43ea4826Text UUID: 01a729b8-805d-4552-8bcd-1c4d0e07cce8Timeline Phase Index: 363Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 584660d3-2f9d-3600-53aa-c8d7e03d10c4Timeline Phase Duration: 6.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                      • +
                                        61.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I like to think I've had a healing touch. Baldur's Gate rises again, brick by brick, stone by stone.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 10d54797-683b-f8c6-b908-248e894f0199Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2de1a26dg160bg4663gb7cfgf6e327cd4877Text UUID: e1a1410f-b680-4d71-9cbd-e9da51e157f9Timeline Phase Index: 253Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 10d54797-683b-f8c6-b908-248e894f0199Timeline Phase Duration: 10.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 10d54797-683b-f8c6-b908-248e894f0199Group Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          748.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Which isn't to say I've gone without opposition.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3298c33-db76-99e5-86ea-f51728099b13Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h32d60c93g1d92g407eg9758g451c0fac5dd3Text UUID: d5b99fa2-e751-4135-8ecb-0b949e7c0b36Group ID: 10d54797-683b-f8c6-b908-248e894f0199Group Index: 1
                                          • See Node 354 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) The people know me as one of the champions who saved their beloved city. They know Ravengard blood flows through my veins.
                                  • +

                                    • +
                                      746.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah, so the God of Ambition has had his eye on me. I'm flattered, old chum.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c27f8e51-2acf-dcf9-3b4a-e2cabd284d3cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h924c4b28gc8a2g40b6gbbf3gf19cc34a2affText UUID: f3d07528-df87-4f46-87b7-0fcd044d2c66Timeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c27f8e51-2acf-dcf9-3b4a-e2cabd284d3cTimeline Phase Duration: 6.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                    • +
                                      151.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Am I hearing this right? Has the great wizard Gale been keeping tabs on the Gate? Consider me flattered.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2996a35f-dc68-3d74-b254-eede1b0d0295Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h0a45cbfegcf5fg4496gbafeg1efd5663ad82Text UUID: e6f9e90f-01b8-4d2c-a94b-72e1f3fd2deeTimeline Phase Index: 206Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2996a35f-dc68-3d74-b254-eede1b0d0295Timeline Phase Duration: 9.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                    • +
                                      210.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Every moment we spend together is a celebration.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a33d267-b8d6-033e-ba69-36149c1c3c4bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3ff68581g38eeg4f4cg8c45g2c85198345d1Text UUID: 5f064447-0c8d-4620-a1c3-e6b33f82596fTimeline Phase Index: 224Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3a33d267-b8d6-033e-ba69-36149c1c3c4bTimeline Phase Duration: 15.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3a33d267-b8d6-033e-ba69-36149c1c3c4bGroup Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        561.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The night we married, the sky lit up with fireworks. My eyes are still filled with their glitter and gold.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 924af21a-e721-a464-ff64-c903758de1a2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb7b386d8g8bedg4cd7g8cd8gadf0978da53eText UUID: 3b3fc89c-3725-43ed-9a22-e29bef737436Group ID: 3a33d267-b8d6-033e-ba69-36149c1c3c4bGroup Index: 1
                                        • •
                                          559.Origin_Intro_Wyll: We danced until the sun threatened to peek above the horizon.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 91469eb5-cb90-f374-ebb2-bad69f4465b2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc927c8fag5abcg43e4ga671ga23e86d6d1e6Text UUID: 685ed3f7-f346-47c4-8db2-fd0703c1b30aGroup ID: 3a33d267-b8d6-033e-ba69-36149c1c3c4bGroup Index: 2
                                  • +

                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bda2fc07-db88-7b0d-1071-635dd8ec2ea1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hc14b933ag5b25g4fc0g8291g65545087045fText 1 UUID: 95c48f94-54c5-403c-97d9-494b759d0f1bText 2 Handle: h2317ee96g4ac4g41dfgb2d3g922a7b136af7Text 2 UUID: a0260fc6-9f4b-4f6a-ac47-8db8da184c79Show Once: True
                                    • +
                                      425.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Every moment we spend together is a joy. And it so happens that someone else has joined the family celebration.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f783e32-87cc-810d-a5af-7f5ea9eebdf1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h552619fag266cg4f57g9777g16948685b1c1Text UUID: be1723f1-3b39-48cf-a172-96dcfa0335d7Timeline Phase Index: 3Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6f783e32-87cc-810d-a5af-7f5ea9eebdf1Timeline Phase Duration: 43.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: 6f783e32-87cc-810d-a5af-7f5ea9eebdf1Group Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        1.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Lily Aurora Ravengard. Treasure of a girl, found at the entrance of the Open Hand Temple - one grey eye, one brown.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 004bc939-94bb-bd77-e23f-a78382dfa3c6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h727becb2g5496g414dga7dbg1554e62efa2fText UUID: 0dc5d755-ad8d-463d-a5f7-15e6e2ea7206Group ID: 6f783e32-87cc-810d-a5af-7f5ea9eebdf1Group Index: 1
                                        • +
                                          525.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The Crying God's faithful thought it a sign. They summoned me the very next day.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8ab61376-816c-6a7e-78a7-82af0676aeb5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6e351994g95c1g4cfcg91bagdd86456aacc3Text UUID: a234829b-9aab-4a8d-b555-290cdbd900cbGroup ID: 6f783e32-87cc-810d-a5af-7f5ea9eebdf1Group Index: 2
                                          • +
                                            965.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Four months of age at most - a mote of love in its purest form. She is perfection.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fcc9a18a-63cf-f09f-7946-e9bc7b044a82Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h8b2e4d63g005dg49c3gba01gcbc235ec0730Text UUID: fc0244d1-2ffb-44c9-8078-fdf669869847Group ID: 6f783e32-87cc-810d-a5af-7f5ea9eebdf1Group Index: 3
                                            • •
                                              170.Origin_Intro_Wyll: When I'm gone, the four pillars will live with her - courage, justice, insight, strategy. May they guide her down the path with the brightest star at its end.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2ed45e79-d966-7c86-cbb4-6d47e5a17540Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h8f197266g76ecg41a1g8369g1f95bea482f6Text UUID: ba770724-1eb3-4c2e-9d6c-690379f7d3b6Group ID: 6f783e32-87cc-810d-a5af-7f5ea9eebdf1Group Index: 4
                                  • +
                                    745.Player: Are you and your illithid lover still together?Full-IllithidORI_Wyll_State_MadeIllithidHomeInUndercityORI_State_Partnered!ORI_State_PartneredWithWyll

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    ruletagtype rule

                                    Text

                                    Variant 1

                                    combine=0
                                    • Full-Illithid
                                    Are you and your illithid lover still together?
                                    h05303b97g708bg4164ga220g764849b2819e | 7d4cad5c-973d-4095-b49a-2a1ea0cb77e7 | stub

                                    Variant 2

                                    Are you and your illithid lover still together?

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c21c8909-0b64-93f3-b5c4-6d6edea4664dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h05303b97g708bg4164ga220g764849b2819eText 1 UUID: 7d4cad5c-973d-4095-b49a-2a1ea0cb77e7Text 2 Handle: hd97577beg9c31g4790g941egb3d77c37baedText 2 UUID: b532225c-c7e4-4d63-a26c-57c8595fe66bShow Once: True
                                    • +
                                      228.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Yes. Though our 'togetherness' isn't so 'together' as we'd like.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3ea456c6-f310-f67e-542a-cc768fb085e7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h33a14856gfc2dg4f5eg99fag17e513743aecText UUID: 91013e6c-08d8-4bdc-a1d9-42e66229dcbbTimeline Phase Index: 361Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3ea456c6-f310-f67e-542a-cc768fb085e7Timeline Phase Duration: 25.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 3ea456c6-f310-f67e-542a-cc768fb085e7Group Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        303.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Illithids hunt in the shadows. I can offer diversion, comfort, the pleasure of company...

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54ed0bbf-e30f-ba96-288f-81441348f5a0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2a7b5cc6gff34g4cf7gbb37g377aab7eb164Text UUID: 7341568e-b523-4106-8418-1b687935a360Group ID: 3ea456c6-f310-f67e-542a-cc768fb085e7Group Index: 1
                                        • +
                                          431.Origin_Intro_Wyll: ... but I can only do so much to warm the chill of the Undercity. My beloved deserves the revel of a full life, not a haunted existence.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 70c5c75c-45a7-a5f0-edd4-c02a38186efdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he5ab0a98g7003g46bagbec2g4e457c40315cText UUID: 1aa933f1-61c6-4022-933b-a347623eb147Group ID: 3ea456c6-f310-f67e-542a-cc768fb085e7Group Index: 2
                                          • •
                                            334.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Yet we stay devoted. Such is the power of love.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5ae9e676-8da2-6f63-2d30-f74a8bd280c4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h0f0e888eg277dg472ag8d7bg9bf6637c16a3Text UUID: 811a76e6-fe6f-47cb-bd7e-9f5c1893cf76Group ID: 3ea456c6-f310-f67e-542a-cc768fb085e7Group Index: 3
                                  • +
                                    138.Player: Mizora's gets involved every chance she gets, I imagine.Full-IllithidCAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact!Karlach
