                                    combine=0
                                    • Full-Illithid
                                    Mizora's gets involved every chance she gets, I imagine.
                                    h0313812agb619g4fbbga22dgbfc8e484d89c | 4c5a8a75-d750-4b28-a299-d14dfea93f94 | stub

                                    Variant 2

                                    Mizora's gets involved every chance she gets, I imagine.
                                    hdafe9cf9gb251g403dga9b4gdc1ef6968acc | 8f2ed7cb-1f0b-4cf2-80de-3350c793a284 | stub

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2798bd1f-f233-cd3b-a17b-467e92ae6282Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h0313812agb619g4fbbga22dgbfc8e484d89cText 1 UUID: 4c5a8a75-d750-4b28-a299-d14dfea93f94Text 2 Handle: hdafe9cf9gb251g403dga9b4gdc1ef6968accText 2 UUID: 8f2ed7cb-1f0b-4cf2-80de-3350c793a284Show Once: True
                                    • +
                                      251.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Mizora's kept me on a long leash, if you can believe it.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 434295f7-ff14-816e-ff6a-491436b59556Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb6b6a025g2266g44ccg9e5bg727ac71f9daaText UUID: d276c9bb-66d8-4f88-9a72-5c277292e04fTimeline Phase Index: 362Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 434295f7-ff14-816e-ff6a-491436b59556Timeline Phase Duration: 12.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 434295f7-ff14-816e-ff6a-491436b59556Group Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        453.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She hasn't ordered any murder sprees or any diabolical errands. But she insists on joining diplomatic missions in human guise.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79289479-920b-dd79-a9a6-3bbed25af9b2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hafc06252g29feg4b49g9291g36efb6e3d61aText UUID: 93912e9f-cbf2-4254-84ee-5bcd2d7e8cb2Group ID: 434295f7-ff14-816e-ff6a-491436b59556Group Index: 1
                                        • +
                                          439.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Her beauty and bargaining talents have even been a boon. Neverwinter's Lord denied me a boatful of his finest masons -

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 741c6b27-a0b7-167d-e6bc-f8ba2484cad1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: haad77130ge895g4edcga5a9g5f79c0d66eafText UUID: c9ddbdd7-6d7c-4e9d-a9b5-85d23c5789d7Timeline Phase Index: 194Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 741c6b27-a0b7-167d-e6bc-f8ba2484cad1Timeline Phase Duration: 8.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                          • +
                                            934.Origin_Intro_Wyll: - 'til Mizora pressed her lips to his ear. A whisper breathed, a bargain made.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f455ed15-a389-dde3-210f-9b9d73466560Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h00ec18b3g602fg4ba1g8ad7g29b4231704ceText UUID: 5efb5d24-2bf3-48f0-be61-de10b5a1690bTimeline Phase Index: 119Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f455ed15-a389-dde3-210f-9b9d73466560Timeline Phase Duration: 6.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                            • +
                                              652.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Whatever her game, I'm bound by her rules. My future'll never be fully my own.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a9ad1f4c-cd37-4b9c-efa4-05c44e78ec05Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h86a5564cg3e3ag490bg9219gc8c8ba11d72fText UUID: d61581d1-b030-436a-90d5-d174d763e0efTimeline Phase Index: 39Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a9ad1f4c-cd37-4b9c-efa4-05c44e78ec05Timeline Phase Duration: 6.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                              • +
                                                195.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But I'll fall on my own blade and join the Blood War in an instant should Zariel's Hells-touched fingers stretch towards Baldur's Gate.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3635dff8-8c28-ec26-050d-fa18adaa5d93Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h4644d30ag3ee9g48b5g9137gd0794a31cd00Text UUID: d22212af-d37e-4edd-95a9-23469f27aa3aTimeline Phase Index: 233Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3635dff8-8c28-ec26-050d-fa18adaa5d93Timeline Phase Duration: 10.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 3635dff8-8c28-ec26-050d-fa18adaa5d93Group Index: 0
                                                • •
                                                  675.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And Mizora knows it.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b001f888-e4e7-446d-c188-b1ba58c76dc0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hbda7bd07ged39g4c0egb93cg7acc47f82850Text UUID: 32042e06-0b76-429d-ad37-7d4c7d349efaGroup ID: 3635dff8-8c28-ec26-050d-fa18adaa5d93Group Index: 1
                                  • +

                                    • +
                                      931.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You'd think she'd have made a mess at every turn, yeah?

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f374c66d-7b0a-28ca-e990-3ce29fbdadbdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h94b1cff5gb95eg4a78gac19g18137a0ef4c4Text UUID: 89a0aede-16b4-4f80-9337-32229035c0e9Timeline Phase Index: 378Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f374c66d-7b0a-28ca-e990-3ce29fbdadbdTimeline Phase Duration: 21.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: f374c66d-7b0a-28ca-e990-3ce29fbdadbdGroup Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        411.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Turns out she's kept me on a loose leash.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c306a37-1824-2f89-2c8e-503137da3fc7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h8a39208eg3346g4a70gb6a7g9f63007066efText UUID: 8c2a90e7-6311-4a64-9b49-719d3ec1db6cGroup ID: f374c66d-7b0a-28ca-e990-3ce29fbdadbdGroup Index: 1
                                        • +
                                          302.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She hasn't ordered a single murder spree or any diabolical errands. She knows I'd sooner fall on my own sword than put the city in danger.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 543a39b1-73a9-b92e-3bd9-285019231b2bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha7445357gc6d8g4a4eg830ag4cb4966a45e5Text UUID: 0a342d24-06b0-4ac9-a1c4-02620ef833f2Group ID: f374c66d-7b0a-28ca-e990-3ce29fbdadbdGroup Index: 2
                                          • +

                                      275.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Damn right.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4d565350-d8d8-99e7-f94a-edd937dfb0cfSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h022c256cgf476g470aga54bga3f49acf14eeText UUID: a861672d-7ef2-456d-8dfa-05211c959bf6Timeline Phase Index: 348Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4d565350-d8d8-99e7-f94a-edd937dfb0cfTimeline Phase Duration: 10.06sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 4d565350-d8d8-99e7-f94a-edd937dfb0cfGroup Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        255.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The hexes and eldritch blasts? Losing them took getting used to. They left behind a cold abyss where fire once raged.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 46a68a76-40fd-0274-7e42-87451d8dfd71Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf11ea23ega228g48b4gae3dg53721b338003Text UUID: 7b94a46d-03bf-447b-acb7-e28bc3d51c92Group ID: 4d565350-d8d8-99e7-f94a-edd937dfb0cfGroup Index: 1
                                        • •
                                          560.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So I stoked a new one. Now the burning comes from within me, not from the depths of Avernus.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9161cb90-93f0-4aef-4f62-41dc50e589a9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb0ac0bdeg3bf5g4174g81c7g911421290011Text UUID: 2fd1374b-bc25-4207-993a-80f921d63d4dTimeline Phase Index: 21Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9161cb90-93f0-4aef-4f62-41dc50e589a9Timeline Phase Duration: 7.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                  • +

                      • +
                        495.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm afraid since we last met, my corpse count remains a paltry zero. Unless you count the boars I've felled on ducal hunts.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 83bf22a3-6027-81e3-42d1-4ba7bb49a14dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfa66fee7gacb3g4d5dg9378g096a072c55a2Text UUID: 6b982f36-5659-40a2-86d9-43ea2e863bafTimeline Phase Index: 73Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 83bf22a3-6027-81e3-42d1-4ba7bb49a14dTimeline Phase Duration: 8.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • +
                          792.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Rebuilding a city requires a politic mind. A sharp soldiering blade, not so much.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cf8bfdb5-42ab-84cb-6642-7515402d8d40Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3c9ea577gf192g4631g8fb1gfa50e86eca89Text UUID: 1d78b820-5bdc-4e34-8cb4-8fc6b9b3d8f2Timeline Phase Index: 191Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cf8bfdb5-42ab-84cb-6642-7515402d8d40Timeline Phase Duration: 6.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 62 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Bargains must be made, coin must change hands, tongues must be held in check.
                  • +
                    124.Player: I've turned my mind to political concerns. We seek a powerful ally: the githzerai.Full-Illithid

                    • +
                      164.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah, diplomacy - not so different from fighting, I find. You still grip your blade, you just hide it beneath a silken glove.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2d23021a-6356-f2f6-a8e8-37ca89cfcea5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h897ef364ga898g4ddagb68ag82f4ef86c61eText UUID: 5a315c29-aa07-469b-a94c-0818086fabeeTimeline Phase Index: 199Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2d23021a-6356-f2f6-a8e8-37ca89cfcea5Timeline Phase Duration: 17.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 2d23021a-6356-f2f6-a8e8-37ca89cfcea5Group Index: 0
                      • +
                        945.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am no stranger to it myself. A city is not rebuilt with the simple wave of a duke's hand.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f6d2cf60-d186-0270-b82f-dfd99da73880Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h920b0499g5d72g4b0bgb9ecg723aebfc6578Text UUID: 77c48932-a50a-468b-b599-da711baf299dGroup ID: 2d23021a-6356-f2f6-a8e8-37ca89cfcea5Group Index: 1
                        • See Node 62 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Bargains must be made, coin must change hands, tongues must be held in check.
                  • +
                    833.Player: It continues apace, though it will take time to topple a powerful queen like Vlaakith.Full-Illithid

                    • +
                      662.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Not to mention the mightiest magic you can muster and the sharpest swords you can forge.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: abe1bc63-364f-88cf-f548-8aadcb58843bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h4dc8db9aga8f5g4913g88b7g416edcb0ff26Text UUID: 55630597-5729-4411-962d-fd693cf63cc8Timeline Phase Index: 36Timeline Dialog Node UUID: abe1bc63-364f-88cf-f548-8aadcb58843bTimeline Phase Duration: 6.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • +
                        730.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My edge may not be so sharp as yours, but I still slip away for a hunt when I can. My heart is never far from the frontiers.ORI_Wyll_State_PartneredMonsterHunt

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Wyll_State_PartneredMonsterHunt {75255ca6-0fd0-8a13-b601-6fe3b624c04d} = True

                          • See Node 62 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Bargains must be made, coin must change hands, tongues must be held in check.
                      • +
                        933.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My own blade's dulled a bit, I'm afraid. Unless you count the boars I've slain on ceremonial hunts, I haven't felled a single beast since the Absolute fell.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f43418de-8d6b-3181-9f71-75450fb8eb57Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h75f6a472gb28cg426agb7fag36f1d9d521adText UUID: 43022d71-2b03-4522-b78d-1806a8980df8Timeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f43418de-8d6b-3181-9f71-75450fb8eb57Timeline Phase Duration: 9.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • See Node 902 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 62
      • +

              492.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Dammit, Astarion! Honeysuckle and jasmine hang in the air, and you're still thinking of open wounds and dripping cadavers.

              451.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh, how right you are, and how wonderful it is. I've had so little time for simple pleasures like this in the two months past.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 78868004-001a-f4df-023a-e2410cfd1751Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1a1f0d0ag840eg47ebgb4ebg934fe03498f7Text UUID: ceea9659-ada0-403b-976b-168ae5f0f02fTimeline Phase Index: 309Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 78868004-001a-f4df-023a-e2410cfd1751Timeline Phase Duration: 15.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 78868004-001a-f4df-023a-e2410cfd1751Group Index: 0

              930.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You don't know what you're missing. The sweetness of honeysuckle, the earthiness of split bark.

            104.Narrator: *You breathe in every scent the night breeze carries. Sweet honeysuckle, tender violets - and an earthy fragrance you immediately recognise: oakwood.*

          670.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I hoped you would remember. Can you believe we haven't been there since that very eve?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: adfaca98-4f46-353c-deab-99b83ea3b263Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he03189e1ga68ag4561g8e31g18423317a851Text UUID: 56909d26-082b-4bec-b68e-3f6217605b06Timeline Phase Index: 293Timeline Dialog Node UUID: adfaca98-4f46-353c-deab-99b83ea3b263Timeline Phase Duration: 21.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: adfaca98-4f46-353c-deab-99b83ea3b263Group Index: 0
          • +
            374.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Time is so precious. If only I could rebuild the city with a wave of the hand.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6343c090-78c9-3a5e-233f-9018987c1b7cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3543a9b7g2132g4ce6gb78ag62920215f778Text UUID: 336968f2-ec76-4843-b05e-5985b32a2073Group ID: adfaca98-4f46-353c-deab-99b83ea3b263Group Index: 1
            • +
              394.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Instead, I must devote myself to political bargains, forging alliances, keeping to custom.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 690f551e-df49-8c35-d2fd-ced9c319e115Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7df7c1ffg455fg4685gabb3g5ef0c0ea836fText UUID: 3f355f07-74cf-4e87-a968-4f3b17ee4b87Group ID: adfaca98-4f46-353c-deab-99b83ea3b263Group Index: 2
              • +
                401.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You've been patient through it all. Your love is the fuel that drives me forward.EPI_Epilogue_Wyll_HasMet

                Flags and Tags

                settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                • EPI_Epilogue_Wyll_HasMet {61c10178-482c-5981-fc0f-2c2baa879eef} = True

                • +
                  460.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Have you been... comfortable in the Undercity? Is there anything more I can bring you?Full-Illithid

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                  • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

                  • +
                    295.Player: You have been an exemplary partner under the circumstances. I want for nothing.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5323e2f5-7f92-4d3f-cad8-a0f010dc790fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h33350fd8gd767g4b56gbde6g618be9d06bb2Text UUID: 7f80a74d-9bbe-4497-8c6b-560fbd98500aShow Once: True
                    • +
                      464.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And yet deserve so much more.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7cb74d40-fe99-189b-3459-8d6464f8ad87Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h8952b158g93f3g4140gb595g4dad798e254aText UUID: acc4474f-761f-409b-963b-bcdf6c38638eTimeline Phase Index: 63Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7cb74d40-fe99-189b-3459-8d6464f8ad87Timeline Phase Duration: 2.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • +
                        891.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh, before I forget - I've made contact with an assassin, name of Artemis, a killer of killers. Certain arrangements can be made.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e941a947-9e92-f24d-d7fd-b44ff48ed506Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf644ca36g2e5bg40b8gad60g5fd6a4d6dae0Text UUID: 43ec2c8f-5282-4414-823f-e79c57a6c73eTimeline Phase Index: 109Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e941a947-9e92-f24d-d7fd-b44ff48ed506Timeline Phase Duration: 10.77sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                        • +
                          847.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Your hunger requires sating. And I mean to provide.

                          Metadata

                          • +

                              • +
                                339.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She hasn't dared flash her wings since we crushed the Netherbrain and freed the infected.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5be8bd2c-a736-63df-f4a8-ace9ba455ea2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha5f6e3ecg5feeg4210ga538g2f99177a26c7Text UUID: fd62261b-f75f-400e-8dab-bd679a60f7abTimeline Phase Index: 311Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5be8bd2c-a736-63df-f4a8-ace9ba455ea2Timeline Phase Duration: 18.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 5be8bd2c-a736-63df-f4a8-ace9ba455ea2Group Index: 0
                                • +
                                  412.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Of course, she took my every last hex and fiendish power along with her. Took some getting used to. They left behind a cold abyss where fire once raged.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c4f42b3-3cc4-c7bd-91fe-69e7ff35cfa0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h0776fc3ag2193g4012g8026g2d49a749fc4bText UUID: 7d32d3b2-aa19-4ed0-b8f8-4ffad1e3e7e6Group ID: 5be8bd2c-a736-63df-f4a8-ace9ba455ea2Group Index: 1
                                  • •
                                    217.No Speaker: Alias
                            • +
                              830.Player: Leave.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: da745a20-061e-460e-b055-4cb0e9b47b01Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4a6784b4gbbf0g4bafga14cgd20384a09c8eText UUID: 70d157d8-2caf-458c-a917-cbd750d1edb7Show Once: True
                              • +
                                547.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It's so freeing, to be together like this outside the confines of the shadows.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8f73ef63-260e-b3ef-9e9a-2ffb43e153c3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha9805118g6e7bg4946gb3c1gaa019e8d45baText UUID: f18594be-9b41-4aa5-98c5-4ba19c29595fTimeline Phase Index: 47Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8f73ef63-260e-b3ef-9e9a-2ffb43e153c3Timeline Phase Duration: 15.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 8f73ef63-260e-b3ef-9e9a-2ffb43e153c3Group Index: 0
                                • +
                                  977.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I love you. Don't ever forget that.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fee633b4-5279-be1d-970b-9ec41678232cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha1653a4ag6b08g40ffga63fg1499fd7f6319Text UUID: f5508b4c-167d-4b7a-9e1d-d32cecee2b9bGroup ID: 8f73ef63-260e-b3ef-9e9a-2ffb43e153c3Group Index: 1
                                  • +
                                    818.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Go on, the night's young. I don't plan on wasting a moment of it.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d766c7e0-b025-623a-fce5-a4c00e0678aeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h95fa37b1ge52bg4cc9gb19fg782f751c65f8Text UUID: f7e8eb23-c4fd-4a73-ad7e-6416c211c1b7Group ID: 8f73ef63-260e-b3ef-9e9a-2ffb43e153c3Group Index: 2

                    382.Player: Only so many criminals stalk the Undercity. I need more food, Wyll.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6543f522-39ba-b798-488f-d09cdc561d2eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h23318ef0gd5fag4c63ga650g6a92614a932cText UUID: 7b3a7bd3-4962-4aba-b275-3e1340bdf2e9Show Once: True

                      813.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I... I know, and I can help. I've made contact with an assassin, name of Artemis, a killer of killers. Certain arrangements can be made.

                      • See Node 847 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Your hunger requires sating. And I mean to provide.
                  • +
                    75.Player: I just want more time with you. I miss you.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 16c2cf87-99e2-7657-083f-38b78366cabaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h416fbd85gbe2fg423eg9c09gbff9ac96fee2Text UUID: dbceda67-ef14-47ef-8c47-469f5581ffb9Show Once: True
                    • +
                      798.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I miss you too. If only ducal life afforded me more time.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d0e696e4-7736-6c79-0c2b-7b86e055be11Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h18016063g834dg411cgab71g99b301d9216fText UUID: 6463a6be-70cb-423c-a919-179309ea9b52Timeline Phase Index: 188Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d0e696e4-7736-6c79-0c2b-7b86e055be11Timeline Phase Duration: 5.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • •

                • +
                  472.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm glad father's left us to our own devices, more or less - though he's got no shortage of advice when I ask for it.CAMP_Ravengard_State_RavengardInCamp!GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated

                                          231.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am Wyll Ravengard, Grand Duke of the Wyrm, Heart of the Gate.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3f304e72-7ab1-6a59-3d3f-7813273f1439Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2535a26ag95b1g49a4g96d5g6dbe07f8133fText UUID: 6ad92c32-ddbf-49cf-bdac-362abc23aeacTimeline Phase Index: 257Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3f304e72-7ab1-6a59-3d3f-7813273f1439Timeline Phase Duration: 16.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 3f304e72-7ab1-6a59-3d3f-7813273f1439Group Index: 0
                                          • +
                                            13.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And there's another I'd like to nominate - Grand Duke of the Coast, Doom of the Dead Three.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 04258881-cb3d-377c-8099-e617fb00a176Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hcf5cc85cg0b40g4132gacedgb6cd90ef9cc9Text UUID: 9c757b31-7ba0-4b0b-b66c-3c9f5deb2027Group ID: 3f304e72-7ab1-6a59-3d3f-7813273f1439Group Index: 1
                                            • +
                                              32.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Namely, I nominate you. Please say you'll accept.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 08755158-6f26-0fb4-ab96-894e9ce3b7f9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h14c5f87eg51b5g412cgb861g7393687b03d7Text UUID: 9807c89d-507e-460d-85ea-dd1bf89a48d6Group ID: 3f304e72-7ab1-6a59-3d3f-7813273f1439Group Index: 2
                                              • +

                                                  66.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Then we've a reason to celebrate tonight twice over. Hail Grand Duke of the Coast, Doom of the Dead Three!

                        • +
                          899.Narrator: *Your soul warms thinking of Lily Aurora Ravengard, your adopted daughter. A treasure of a girl, found at the entrance of the Open Hand Temple - one grey eye, one brown.*

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eac08ad1-41f9-bc69-0492-bc429d817703Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h19938373g458ag4629g8445g3a1922bb5c01Text UUID: 2b18d01f-ec81-4d14-96e5-edac8cbdc005Timeline Phase Index: 382Timeline Dialog Node UUID: eac08ad1-41f9-bc69-0492-bc429d817703Timeline Phase Duration: 39.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: eac08ad1-41f9-bc69-0492-bc429d817703Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            426.Narrator: *The Crying God's faithful thought it a sign. They summoned Wyll the very next day.*

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f8724e8-0cd7-1d7e-9ad8-a598de2d4450Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h3d0ca2f1gdce5g40a7g966fg287195974ee0Text UUID: ed1632bb-1c87-42c8-8819-7a1ac5ccbb82Group ID: eac08ad1-41f9-bc69-0492-bc429d817703Group Index: 1
                            • +
                              655.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah, the girl could melt the staunchest heart. She might even have brought a smile to old Withers' face!

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aa0b13bb-6711-0497-30a6-fd55cba33b7bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h436db7c5gd76dg4b91g847dg48f977e48282Text UUID: c53bb526-e201-448f-a791-81d4d470238cGroup ID: eac08ad1-41f9-bc69-0492-bc429d817703Group Index: 2
                              • •
                                288.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But tonight is for us - and Lily's only four months of age, besides. I promise, the Temple will keep her in good care.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 50e7488f-3796-fd91-1aed-c60a58f87cecSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h0e76cd9bg5d52g488cg9688g0ba90c78ff87Text UUID: a1a08aca-6d75-4904-b564-3ab1aa4a862eGroup ID: eac08ad1-41f9-bc69-0492-bc429d817703Group Index: 3
                      • +

                        • +
                          454.Origin_Intro_Wyll: That makes two of us - though losing the hexes and eldritch blasts took getting used to. They left behind a cold abyss where fire once raged.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7967ebe3-1d10-0539-c3e7-8257de4426fbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he0879918gbc05g4ebdgb4aag48cb632daa4aText UUID: b20f9919-2e79-4346-a833-55ef89de8a18Timeline Phase Index: 67Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7967ebe3-1d10-0539-c3e7-8257de4426fbTimeline Phase Duration: 10.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

          841.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Dammit, my love. Honeysuckle hangs in the air, and you're thinking of open wounds and dripping cadavers! Ah, but what does it matter?

        h41bbbd3fg479bg46dbgb448g46c53e37db15 | 297071f8-4ad7-4c1d-8824-d4ad1efa19c8 | stub

            • See Node 401 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) You've been patient through it all. Your love is the fuel that drives me forward.

          683.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh, how right you are, and how wonderful it is. We've had too little time for pleasures like these.

                554.Origin_Intro_Wyll: A great Warrior of the Comet walks among us! Looking as stunning as ever - if a bit less corporeal than I expected.END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyllEPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologram

                • +
                  350.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Phew - probably for the best. I smell like a seventy-year-old cinder.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5ea29858-bfff-366c-781a-5bd2fdb04e6cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf52495e0ge315g4651g8dcag655117835e84Text UUID: c3e310c5-68d6-4ce3-ad30-d7cd7540d1adTimeline Phase Index: 305Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5ea29858-bfff-366c-781a-5bd2fdb04e6cTimeline Phase Duration: 5.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    544.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Withers yanked me from Avernus with my blade halfway through a cambion's belly without so much as a chance at a washing up.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8f4ee7dd-7552-f2fc-af99-74e380bf1f27Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3366f4ceg90e9g454cgb37fg161aa92357e0Text UUID: aa30b8e3-d329-4303-99f3-88217f1605b4Timeline Phase Index: 48Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8f4ee7dd-7552-f2fc-af99-74e380bf1f27Timeline Phase Duration: 7.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +
                      805.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And you? I wager you've cracked open more kith'raki heads than you could possibly count.Lae'zel

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5} = True

                          379.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Then you did keep count. I should've known you would!

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 63ffa6c0-5706-1ae7-467b-7c6ee2d54aceSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he6d0e28fg4e8dg445ega11ag5d6ec4238a65Text UUID: dda0a114-f17f-490d-8061-e6c1115caac7Timeline Phase Index: 314Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 63ffa6c0-5706-1ae7-467b-7c6ee2d54aceTimeline Phase Duration: 4.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            881.Origin_Intro_Wyll: How you'd thrill in the hellhunt. Slaying fiends is electrifying. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I've been itching to tell.!Lae'zel

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

                            • +

                                • +
                                  172.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Yes - let's see how I compare to the fierce flame that is Karlach!

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 300df5ad-3c4c-a371-7f48-ffe0861af7ebSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1f592cc6g1f1cg421aga99cgfc15b0349c48Text UUID: 183e95f4-ead7-48ab-8d19-142041c88c06Timeline Phase Index: 197Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 300df5ad-3c4c-a371-7f48-ffe0861af7ebTimeline Phase Duration: 4.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                  • +
                                    22.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You'll have to choose one tale though, or I'll be yammering all night!

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0646edea-46cd-34b4-3094-6b579bb9fd55Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h43aafbf5g68f5g4cc7gb0ccga7b85aa1a5ebText UUID: 9a7a5e56-5ca7-4241-b60b-562aedb2968dTimeline Phase Index: 255Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0646edea-46cd-34b4-3094-6b579bb9fd55Timeline Phase Duration: 4.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                                    • +
                                      973.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You want to hear about the amnizu at the Styx, the three-tusked orthon, or the invading goristroi?

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fe639175-5b13-ee94-32b5-448abfd40470Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6eddbe8eg964cg4598g94aag2e0cbb829d4fText UUID: 941fa1c7-66f5-41bd-9923-e6d544354881Timeline Phase Index: 126Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fe639175-5b13-ee94-32b5-448abfd40470Timeline Phase Duration: 7.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                      • +
                                        387.Player: I want to hear about the amnizu.Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        ruletagtype rule
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                                        Text

                                        Variant 1

                                        combine=0
                                        • Full-Illithid
                                        I want to hear about the amnizu.
                                        hea9e3f27gd6bag4fcdgb719g6361f25fbdd2 | 2327ed61-e7aa-49c6-8741-692be7003f81 | stub

                                        Variant 2

                                        I want to hear about the amnizu.
                                        h90454481gc50eg4be1gacafg4069f47d2a30 | fa7c82d0-cf93-407c-bc4b-a895095b8f9b | stub

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 673f521e-3a6d-e434-22f6-aa5d388bb8d8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hea9e3f27gd6bag4fcdgb719g6361f25fbdd2Text 1 UUID: 2327ed61-e7aa-49c6-8741-692be7003f81Text 2 Handle: h90454481gc50eg4be1gacafg4069f47d2a30Text 2 UUID: fa7c82d0-cf93-407c-bc4b-a895095b8f9bShow Once: True
                                        • +
                                          369.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Styx devils, they're called. They usually prefer the frozen wastes of Stygia, but Zariel's got a few of her own for guarding the River of Blood.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 630f0da0-0a09-9fa3-6370-c8f3e75874a6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h73035a30g92aeg40edga12ag04c2d3396db6Text UUID: f04172d7-4818-4170-b9a5-7537cb1bd1caTimeline Phase Index: 376Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 630f0da0-0a09-9fa3-6370-c8f3e75874a6Timeline Phase Duration: 37.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 630f0da0-0a09-9fa3-6370-c8f3e75874a6Group Index: 0
                                          • +
                                            917.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Fat bastards, all of them. Was on the heels of a merregon who'd been stalking the Wild Hills and sprinted a little too close to the Styx.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f0037d20-13b9-5ebb-0f69-b123da7d34c6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6ec9022egde8ag46bag8de5g5469bb5aec8dText UUID: d40dec9d-9117-42a8-b7d2-e5a2ca0e88fcGroup ID: 630f0da0-0a09-9fa3-6370-c8f3e75874a6Group Index: 1
                                            • +
                                              497.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I felt my mind start to drain - an amnizu specialty. Bought just enough time for one of its minions to grab me and dangle me over the river.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 842b6f84-ced5-c41b-a02f-dbe92d7cc333Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he6f57942gcd2dg4319ga0b0g8586b6f21035Text UUID: 0b6be49e-eaf6-4416-8257-d23d5af4f291Group ID: 630f0da0-0a09-9fa3-6370-c8f3e75874a6Group Index: 2
                                              • +
                                                279.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Could feel the Styx tugging at my memories as I hung over it, eager to drink me dry.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4df00758-36fb-ab5d-3ad8-c43418b03e64Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he9dbac18g7186g4b90gafb1gd102e5bdb368Text UUID: 97bc041d-6cb0-417f-af83-33849d07eb43Group ID: 630f0da0-0a09-9fa3-6370-c8f3e75874a6Group Index: 3
                                                • +
                                                  609.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Good thing I never touch foot in the Hells without my companion wolf Lily.!CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  checktype Global
                                                  • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = False

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9da928df-2c60-d302-4bdf-a51a9c7057f9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha218d305gb9a9g485cg9c10g7b4380ee4aa3Text UUID: 0b066b3f-2475-4580-ad5d-016a2f3fca79Timeline Phase Index: 381Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9da928df-2c60-d302-4bdf-a51a9c7057f9Timeline Phase Duration: 22.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 9da928df-2c60-d302-4bdf-a51a9c7057f9Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    604.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She was just the distraction I needed. She nipped at the minion's heels and I leapt from its grasp, unsheathed my shortswords, and rushed at the amnizu in a fury.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9ce88466-6246-7730-9490-b85825568f3bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h21f7853cg37dcg4d96gb612g694142ed681aText UUID: 08de4c00-3a8c-4906-a8d8-b73432eb3a41Group ID: 9da928df-2c60-d302-4bdf-a51a9c7057f9Group Index: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      291.Origin_Intro_Wyll: When we'd finished, all that remained was a pair of paltry wings atop a pile of viscera.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 526e134f-e69c-1c72-4dc6-05ee13f3cc91Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h42041938g6cbdg42b7ga7a9ge129f1a34f66Text UUID: ec6aaa33-b839-43de-bd6d-d725ffdf5a93Group ID: 9da928df-2c60-d302-4bdf-a51a9c7057f9Group Index: 2
                                                      • •
                                                        707.Jump to Node 284

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: JumpUUID: b83aa91a-dbbb-08f4-4ea8-a4ce55561ecbJump Target: Node 284 (4f2f16fb-9c0a-0610-fe69-613dfe03ca2d)Jump Target Point: 2
                                                • +
                                                  190.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But not even the Hells' minions are immune to a Circle of Death. And I had just enough strength left to conjure one.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3557fcff-b53c-16e4-bf3c-4a129c289572Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he9809e37g7163g4857g811bg414d9fc7f923Text UUID: e9832c74-2d4a-4520-8724-b9f01ecb6878Timeline Phase Index: 237Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3557fcff-b53c-16e4-bf3c-4a129c289572Timeline Phase Duration: 22.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 3557fcff-b53c-16e4-bf3c-4a129c289572Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    709.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I leapt free of the minion's grasp, unsheathed my shortswords, and rushed at the amnizu in a fury.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b90cc7a3-3ece-f60c-7444-f26779438e82Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc34320cbg1fcag46dag91bbg630fcbbcd3f5Text UUID: 48ad23b3-573d-4491-a45f-078bb91ecd73Group ID: 3557fcff-b53c-16e4-bf3c-4a129c289572Group Index: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      593.Origin_Intro_Wyll: When I'd finished, all that remained was a pair of paltry wings atop a pile of viscera.

                                                      Metadata

                                        309.Player: A three-tusked orthon? Go on.Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        A three-tusked orthon? Go on.

                                        Variant 2

                                        A three-tusked orthon? Go on.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5695db07-92e8-2578-f2da-29b8b68fe8d7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hbf053812gebcdg4cfegb51ag2941ead33c68Text 1 UUID: a144e946-879c-4658-9208-bc16fd083389Text 2 Handle: h4ea001fcgfa84g4518ga45cg0ec490087fb6Text 2 UUID: 25ebb185-193c-4069-b2b2-0f864445cb29Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          47.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Word travels fast when a devil crosses the Delimbiyr Vale near Daggerford.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0bf5da28-29d9-639f-10f3-9f062e74274bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he2772f04gc5ffg4910gb094g4a573c9e3be3Text UUID: 94448655-2807-4ada-9a11-5d6598500472Timeline Phase Index: 249Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0bf5da28-29d9-639f-10f3-9f062e74274bTimeline Phase Duration: 25.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 0bf5da28-29d9-639f-10f3-9f062e74274bGroup Index: 0
                                          • +
                                            336.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It had travelled a hellrift to a long-forsaken shrine. Luckily, the trail it scorched into the frontiers was hard to miss.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5baf63ae-42ca-57d3-db2a-f25cd6d106d9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h362090a9g81ffg415eg84d9gfbe6cd2029d4Text UUID: ba8d8cd9-b50a-494a-88d8-f6c73f33693eGroup ID: 0bf5da28-29d9-639f-10f3-9f062e74274bGroup Index: 1
                                            • +
                                              731.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It led to an isle of cracked rock in Avernus floating amid a molten sea. The orthon stood heaving, breath like brimstone and ash.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bed1582b-ff09-b198-c747-2b39be8f7529Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h58ee0676g1bc9g4093ga38fg931409aa5c5dText UUID: ae55f2cd-d2a8-454a-bc85-88996a826a53Group ID: 0bf5da28-29d9-639f-10f3-9f062e74274bGroup Index: 2
                                              • +
                                                447.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And then it charged, splitting the ground with every thud, so fast it left a trail of smoke. I could barely nick it - not with a blade, not with an eldritch blast.CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Global
                                                • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7771ac36-9d10-d0f6-a749-efe58993f401Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h79961fc0g3208g4651gad21g55a4c611bd38Text UUID: 2cb73688-387d-457b-95a9-bbb3e6e5f7c8Timeline Phase Index: 68Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7771ac36-9d10-d0f6-a749-efe58993f401Timeline Phase Duration: 11.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                • +
                                                  307.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It was the wardevil's weight that proved its own undoing.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 55ec2dd0-c164-109b-7efe-fd7658d7f367Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hbe89addcg3e2ag4f31gaa0eg93fd320c2e3aText UUID: 23dac4e8-a99a-409d-b0e6-d3190f555d5aTimeline Phase Index: 375Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 55ec2dd0-c164-109b-7efe-fd7658d7f367Timeline Phase Duration: 4.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    969.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The third charge it made, I struck the rock with Scorching Ray. The ground split apart the moment the beast stomped onto it.CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                    checktype Global
                                                    • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = True

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fda24506-1843-a731-7433-c1742507f65fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: heee0f40dgc1c1g45fdgb86dg827e68d03a15Text UUID: 93de97a1-b4ce-44f3-8b45-f5d67aa0e9b8Timeline Phase Index: 128Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fda24506-1843-a731-7433-c1742507f65fTimeline Phase Duration: 8.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      284.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The orthon slowly sunk, howling into the magma beneath. I let two of its tusks sink with it; the third I sliced free and presented to the First Duke of Daggerford, a rare trophy to grace his walls.

                                                      Text

                                                      The orthon slowly sunk, howling into the magma beneath. I let two of its tusks sink with it; the third I sliced free and presented to the First Duke of Daggerford, a rare trophy to grace his walls.
                                                      h4ddc6b55g440bg494egad4age96c397452c1 | aa2e1936-16fd-4006-a679-03dd00e531ef | stub

                                                      • +

                                                            966.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah. A kiss as sweet as the first you ever gave me.

                                                        790.Player: I've missed you, Wyll.GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfAvernus!a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyllEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellEND_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyll

                                                        • +
                                                          283.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And I you.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f044b9a-b822-32c6-46ac-7e43857599a9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf517a208gc691g402dg9068g2d959a1c422cText UUID: f227515e-c2cd-490a-9134-0befffeebdc9Timeline Phase Index: 227Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4f044b9a-b822-32c6-46ac-7e43857599a9Timeline Phase Duration: 7.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 4f044b9a-b822-32c6-46ac-7e43857599a9Group Index: 0
                                                          • +
                                                            204.Origin_Intro_Wyll: If only you could stay here with me on the Coast. But Karlach's heart needs you more than mine.a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll

                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                            settype Local
                                                            • a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll {9c7448d5-af06-2578-5461-55f271970ed4} = True

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3832ae95-eddb-c08b-f7f3-743f1baa4cb5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1c7a1b6eg325bg4a89gbd29g246ab9940feeText UUID: 65f36864-a334-45c7-81a3-3465434618c2Group ID: 4f044b9a-b822-32c6-46ac-7e43857599a9Group Index: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              429.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But one day, the flames will be doused and Karlach's heart will be cured. I'm certain of it.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 705079cf-1cc9-239d-bfdb-b2fd599ed7b8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he15aece2g8ab0g4f51g8e02gdf85180f0111Text UUID: 40fad83f-235a-4822-b734-dfc1d87420a4Timeline Phase Index: 319Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 705079cf-1cc9-239d-bfdb-b2fd599ed7b8Timeline Phase Duration: 10.65sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 705079cf-1cc9-239d-bfdb-b2fd599ed7b8Group Index: 0
                                                              • •
                                                                611.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And that, my love, is the day we can finally be together.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e99e480-fb21-57b5-33ea-097b4b78e953Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfe37c532gfa23g4e15g985bg2b8b911cba2cText UUID: 483645aa-96d7-4ff9-9254-3f8ab6ad9907Group ID: 705079cf-1cc9-239d-bfdb-b2fd599ed7b8Group Index: 1
                                                      • +
                                                        241.Player: I've missed you, Wyll.GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfAvernus!a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyllEND_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyllEPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologram

                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 40eda9bb-679b-7b58-6bae-80b36dec2007Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha97a606dg4be3g4132g87cfg18a73f180b33Text UUID: eaec2986-e4ba-47a4-b9a9-81fb0715caf2Show Once: True
                                                        • +
                                                          701.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And I you.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b662c076-d207-66fd-0c91-2da43ebc398cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfdb34539g4fc1g413ag9102g0052a1b05759Text UUID: 346c4caa-9d36-4874-b6c1-ccc6bf379a16Timeline Phase Index: 87Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b662c076-d207-66fd-0c91-2da43ebc398cTimeline Phase Duration: 17.52sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: b662c076-d207-66fd-0c91-2da43ebc398cGroup Index: 0
                                                          • +
                                                            927.Origin_Intro_Wyll: When I lay to rest, I like to imagine you atop a red dragon, soaring across the endless night.a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll

                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                            settype Local
                                                            • a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll {9c7448d5-af06-2578-5461-55f271970ed4} = True

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f29f8104-600e-2101-b3b7-bf7b64ea926dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc5b5a8c3g1c4eg4a79g84deg37abc8589840Text UUID: 5ec7f6d3-f882-44a7-ac05-a4695b3a1977Group ID: b662c076-d207-66fd-0c91-2da43ebc398cGroup Index: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              507.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Even when brimstone fills my lungs and magma laps at my feet, it brings me comfort knowing you shine bright among the stars.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8652fb60-fec2-7bce-b97c-f7642705320aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd61feba4g5c82g4233gaa54g784018c578adText UUID: 1d758ff2-ceb5-4cc3-9f81-805597583e30Group ID: b662c076-d207-66fd-0c91-2da43ebc398cGroup Index: 2
                                                              • +
                                                                259.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I look forward to the day I've doused Karlach's fires and you've conquered the skies.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 47399487-6bd9-c6b3-1da6-42696686d63aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h50c710f2ga0a4g4cb4ga18egd4e6be7001b6Text UUID: 8bf62848-467b-406d-90ce-5a67b1dabc3aTimeline Phase Index: 264Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 47399487-6bd9-c6b3-1da6-42696686d63aTimeline Phase Duration: 8.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 47399487-6bd9-c6b3-1da6-42696686d63aGroup Index: 0
                                                                • •
                                                                  31.Origin_Intro_Wyll: For that is the day we can finally be together.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 08564332-a821-7614-70f1-a7e16cc0d256Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2535688bg6fb9g4965gae76g6af1978466b9Text UUID: c729fa66-3452-4028-9cc2-da036def4f17Group ID: 47399487-6bd9-c6b3-1da6-42696686d63aGroup Index: 1
                                                      • +
                                                        686.Player: I've missed travelling with you. You were a pleasure to be around.Full-Illithid!ORI_State_PartneredWithWyll!END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyll

                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                        ruletagtype rule
                                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                                                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                                        • ORI_State_PartneredWithWyll {5db4c1b6-3c42-43ae-aa85-1844acbf5a1d} = False
                                                        • END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyll {3b60022c-b8a5-445e-b66a-21154f9fd73b} = False

                                                            940.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Still - even when brimstone fills my lungs and magma laps at my feet, it brings me comfort knowing you shine bright among the stars.

                                                        • +
                                                          54.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I won't lie - losing the eldritch blasts and the hexes took some getting used to. Nothing but void where once there was hellfire.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0f0f8342-82d5-d858-90fa-db355f267ef8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc4675a79g017ag4de3g9738g7cbe3dc1b017Text UUID: 00129511-7fa6-4ed7-a3b9-43ee17d06ad7Timeline Phase Index: 247Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0f0f8342-82d5-d858-90fa-db355f267ef8Timeline Phase Duration: 10.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • •
                                                            835.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So I stoked new fires in myself using the lessons my father once taught me. The Blade of Avernus is a ranger - a hunter of the most hellish prey.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dbcadbaa-e51e-8cbb-1c1f-d8ef0944d2dbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc943ef77g2067g4f49gbec0gd202d943520aText UUID: 1d900e4f-1283-45b4-b4a1-ff295a7f3822Timeline Phase Index: 175Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dbcadbaa-e51e-8cbb-1c1f-d8ef0944d2dbTimeline Phase Duration: 11.42sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • +

                                                          605.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Go on, my treasure, the night's young. You shouldn't waste a moment of it.ORI_State_PartneredWithWyll

                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                          checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

                                                          • •
                                                            937.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Or waste a single drop of wine, for that matter. I plan on downing a half a bottle myself. Oops - did I say half a bottle? I meant half a dozen. [End]

                                                          • END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedWyll {3b60022c-b8a5-445e-b66a-21154f9fd73b} = True
                                                          • See Node 937 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Or waste a single drop of wine, for that matter. I plan on downing a half a bottle myself. Oops - did I say half a bottle? I meant half a dozen.
                                                        • +
                                                          476.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Go on, the night's young. You shouldn't waste a moment of it.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7fcb4a03-20b2-0aa6-adf0-ce84dee827e2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf1ed5ec1g483cg4253g847agabc062820789Text UUID: 4fd8949b-6d57-4403-ad16-83d7652698d6Timeline Phase Index: 55Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7fcb4a03-20b2-0aa6-adf0-ce84dee827e2Timeline Phase Duration: 4.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • See Node 937 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Or waste a single drop of wine, for that matter. I plan on downing a half a bottle myself. Oops - did I say half a bottle? I meant half a dozen.
                                                  • +
                                                    663.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The third charge it made, I struck the rock with Hail of Thorns. The ground split apart the moment the beast stomped onto it.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac444ae3-2072-920d-c208-db209172530eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he219fdd4g17a6g4717g8912gdb85304a6d7bText UUID: a485246b-40d8-4a3c-a6c5-16d47da965daTimeline Phase Index: 34Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac444ae3-2072-920d-c208-db209172530eTimeline Phase Duration: 8.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                    • See Node 284 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) The orthon slowly sunk, howling into the magma beneath. I let two of its tusks sink with it; the third I sliced free and presented to the First Duke of Daggerford, a rare trophy to grace his walls.
                                              • +
                                                591.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And then it charged, splitting the ground with every thud, so fast it left a trail of smoke. I could barely nick it - not with a blade, not with an arrow.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9a42262d-bdf6-fa0a-3577-a42774b00de7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hae2721d7g4a6cg498bgbb30ga9f74a4900ccText UUID: 915ddfc6-4c51-450e-87de-d0688ec8e186Timeline Phase Index: 8Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9a42262d-bdf6-fa0a-3577-a42774b00de7Timeline Phase Duration: 11.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • See Node 307 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) It was the wardevil's weight that proved its own undoing.
                                      • +
                                        141.Player: Tell me about the goristroi.Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        ruletagtype rule
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                                        Text

                                        Variant 1

                                        combine=0
                                        • Full-Illithid
                                        Tell me about the goristroi.
                                        h7b7039b6g5c89g49a9gb516gfab9b0edad14 | 857fd4e8-8289-403e-96b8-82e9a138bf8b | stub

                                        Variant 2

                                        Tell me about the goristroi.
                                        h09146115g37cbg46b3g9a4cg5a62e2e3cf32 | f5e039c1-13ce-4ad6-809e-6ceb3d0f8288 | stub

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2801994b-87e6-5c54-d92a-ffe3b9567007Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h7b7039b6g5c89g49a9gb516gfab9b0edad14Text 1 UUID: 857fd4e8-8289-403e-96b8-82e9a138bf8bText 2 Handle: h09146115g37cbg46b3g9a4cg5a62e2e3cf32Text 2 UUID: f5e039c1-13ce-4ad6-809e-6ceb3d0f8288Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          762.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Not just a pair but a pack. Demonkin with no business treading the Hells. Seems they had sights on a paeliryon, one of Zariel's spies -

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c6ad88fd-1413-4138-b750-e58e015af802Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb40a58dfg19ceg48dfgb43dg845bd67931faText UUID: bc4939cb-bd49-4bc1-a8c0-e23eab999bb0Timeline Phase Index: 302Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c6ad88fd-1413-4138-b750-e58e015af802Timeline Phase Duration: 34.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: c6ad88fd-1413-4138-b750-e58e015af802Group Index: 0
                                          • +
                                            906.Origin_Intro_Wyll: At least, until I caught their eye. I wasn't the hunter anymore. I was the hunted - and they were the first to land a blow. Hoof to the back, left a right nasty scar.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ec5976f8-a184-be64-b87c-811c914693cfSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdf20d0a2g1144g4aeagb929ge8caf3bb0403Text UUID: 81fe6bf5-6e8b-46be-9226-19e28f37a4aeGroup ID: c6ad88fd-1413-4138-b750-e58e015af802Group Index: 1
                                            • +
                                              375.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Good thing for me, I'd learned every goristro's weakness: they're dumb as bugbears on a bender. Throw something shiny, and they'll chase it.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 636b930c-d90b-f534-7bdb-fcbddf783f69Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha1ac4747ge364g4ee7g9c34g8fd54957aa83Text UUID: 0bad5f3f-e713-42f8-bd9e-b6c2f379ddf4Group ID: c6ad88fd-1413-4138-b750-e58e015af802Group Index: 2
                                              • +
                                                253.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Tossed a handful of gold pieces and they scattered. I summoned a few stinking clouds, and they dropped before grabbing a single coin.CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Global
                                                • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 45e67a71-5281-55ae-458c-e1ff9c2cef09Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h43fbed96g4013g464cgbba0gc96adf2e500aText UUID: ffd9da01-6fd9-4614-a772-99b835eb5de5Timeline Phase Index: 350Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 45e67a71-5281-55ae-458c-e1ff9c2cef09Timeline Phase Duration: 8.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • +
                                                  282.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Slit their necks for good measure. The damn things may be stupid, but they're sturdy, and I wasn't in the mood for nasty surprises.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4e7825e5-10d7-2f7d-5f4e-93c6c3d67fadSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h775c90e5g7cdfg4270gad1ag262cb43a7682Text UUID: 4e23d5e6-c130-4086-af07-a846a176ac46Timeline Phase Index: 385Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4e7825e5-10d7-2f7d-5f4e-93c6c3d67fadTimeline Phase Duration: 8.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                  • •

                                              • +
                                                942.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Tossed a handful of gold pieces and they scattered. A flurry of arrows dropped them before they could grab a single coin.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f5a3207b-f4dd-2edb-b629-589cc889a804Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hccc7332bgd4a9g4f74gb5dbgcda162524e9cText UUID: e3bf9cdd-3b79-4094-9cbc-026ea2b0865cTimeline Phase Index: 142Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f5a3207b-f4dd-2edb-b629-589cc889a804Timeline Phase Duration: 8.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                • See Node 282 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Slit their necks for good measure. The damn things may be stupid, but they're sturdy, and I wasn't in the mood for nasty surprises.
                              • +

                                  79.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Yes! But just the one, or I'll be yammering all night.

                                  423.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You'll have to choose one tale and one tale only, I'm afraid, or I'll be yammering all night!

                                          233.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Till then, I'll keep sinking my blades into every fiend with its eyes trained on the Sword Coast. And I've got a story for each and every one.

                                          Metadata

                                        205.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I wish you'd come with me. Do battle together, just like the old days.ORI_Wyll_State_TogetherButApart

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                        • ORI_Wyll_State_TogetherButApart {87cd3adb-f4b0-44c0-9c35-d5fa1f0b0784} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 38cbf4b5-7ccd-30dc-6627-3705370f49ffSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd9319a18g2fa9g4961gb675ga260cea225ffText UUID: 36a6f0fa-6dc6-427b-a6cc-5b4fbb911d2eTimeline Phase Index: 226Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 38cbf4b5-7ccd-30dc-6627-3705370f49ffTimeline Phase Duration: 19.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 38cbf4b5-7ccd-30dc-6627-3705370f49ffGroup Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          488.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I miss you. Tonight, I toast not just the people we've become -

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 825c9c48-b5bc-6649-b2a7-f93eda350231Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha8d28734g7e6dg4c0cgb851g7d66e396f3bdText UUID: 8a3714e6-c42e-4a24-b8f4-a01c308f441aGroup ID: 38cbf4b5-7ccd-30dc-6627-3705370f49ffGroup Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            276.Origin_Intro_Wyll: - but the people we were. Warriors. Winners. Saviours. Lovers.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4d578c64-0c9b-66fa-1a7b-d3d9d332e2aaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7a9bc9b4g360cg4606gab87g1c3e3ad0e3d4Text UUID: cde89146-0dc7-40f1-9ae3-689cc443b30bGroup ID: 38cbf4b5-7ccd-30dc-6627-3705370f49ffGroup Index: 2
                                            • +
                                              466.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My heart is still yours. And so it will be, until time stops and the planes split to pieces.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7d46feea-47f8-c731-e485-33f6b255eb4fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfc25ba01gec2fg4dddgb592gce69f1f1da87Text UUID: e6927459-f866-4e1f-bce6-7fcf2c44206cTimeline Phase Index: 232Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7d46feea-47f8-c731-e485-33f6b255eb4fTimeline Phase Duration: 15.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 7d46feea-47f8-c731-e485-33f6b255eb4fGroup Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                198.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Now go on, the night's young. You shouldn't waste a moment of it.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 37060cd8-82d6-64c8-e5ab-b39ec0665ca9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h219b4969g5f54g4767gb18egbd3e383be9c8Text UUID: 8d7a6d67-e196-43bc-b6e1-a9bfd380fdb0Group ID: 7d46feea-47f8-c731-e485-33f6b255eb4fGroup Index: 1
                                                • •
                                                  298.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Or a single drop of wine, for that matter. I plan on downing at least half a bottle. Oops - did I say half a bottle? I meant half a dozen. [End]

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 53df5e3f-88b7-bc07-9bb0-68ce54fcb2bdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hbc5095e0g202fg48c2g8f80gc2a4e9f10dc0Text UUID: 364c060d-78f6-4ab2-84ae-4676cd4bd039Timeline Phase Index: 387Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 53df5e3f-88b7-bc07-9bb0-68ce54fcb2bdTimeline Phase Duration: 10.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
                                      • +

                          • +
                            680.Origin_Intro_Wyll: How you'd thrill in the hellhunt, Lae'zel. Slaying fiends is electrifying. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I've been itching to tell.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b16fac8b-ed6c-93f4-9375-f2c03cd15602Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2a7d5c81g6e52g42ddgae61g821b173aa16aText UUID: 08f6fd34-d6e1-4815-b276-753f9871c6a3Timeline Phase Index: 30Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b16fac8b-ed6c-93f4-9375-f2c03cd15602Timeline Phase Duration: 12.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                            • See Node 223 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Ah, I don't suppose you'd indulge me?
                      • +

                          892.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Diplomacy - not so different from fighting, I find. You still grip your blade, you just hide it beneath a silken glove.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9993959-a3b5-31b3-281f-cb6d45a46de1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdf5141b7ga5e9g4fa8gb923g7df7b4984ee3Text UUID: 2fec5263-9b4f-4dec-b7c6-ed9285c87436Timeline Phase Index: 118Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e9993959-a3b5-31b3-281f-cb6d45a46de1Timeline Phase Duration: 9.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                114.Origin_Intro_Wyll: A great Warrior of the Comet walks among us! Well - a projection of her, at least.FemaleMale

                Flags and Tags

                ruletagtype rule
                • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f}
                • Male {8f74d144-041e-4035-a9ac-72f41fc32de7}

                Text

                Variant 1

                combine=0
                • Female
                A great Warrior of the Comet walks among us! Well - a projection of her, at least.

          • +
            578.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Well, never mind that. By the living gods, Karlach, It's so good to see you.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 96e68233-a3ff-ba1e-8445-1e53c0b9608fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h919abef4gc05fg4daag8b48g6bff0158d441Text UUID: c413d975-35cc-4042-b873-cc036c89842cTimeline Phase Index: 12Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 96e68233-a3ff-ba1e-8445-1e53c0b9608fTimeline Phase Duration: 18.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 96e68233-a3ff-ba1e-8445-1e53c0b9608fGroup Index: 0
            • +
              718.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I can hardly believe we haven't crossed paths. I wager you've cracked open more than your share of hell-heads.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bc9b77ea-cff1-4e59-1c43-cfb52f6d6e18Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he797fe74g5916g4873g904cgd846911da41eText UUID: 40389338-1bb9-406a-b826-82d4e0b9dba0Group ID: 96e68233-a3ff-ba1e-8445-1e53c0b9608fGroup Index: 1
              • +
                732.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Electrifying, isn't it? The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I could tell.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bf1c2564-f7a7-7ab1-347a-1171fee4fd8fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h4dd9dbd4g11abg41dag8059g0307b8ee0444Text UUID: e4b50f22-e181-474a-ac7c-fe7a37d55ac9Group ID: 96e68233-a3ff-ba1e-8445-1e53c0b9608fGroup Index: 2

        • +

          • +
            116.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But dammit all, you are too bold a soul to be slinking in shadows.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 23af76e6-6b9d-ef79-12df-147984485857Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3d663438g576fg4d51g9a76g5b29ef740a01Text UUID: 0f49ab08-45db-47b9-a154-bb33778c40f8Group ID: b130b049-1d0d-3c71-482a-8145590c0be1Group Index: 1
            • +
              543.Player: I made my choice for the good of Faerûn and beyond. I don't regret it.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8e82b768-a1a5-1e17-4761-027ab3680227Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h20b8ccdcgd168g4651gb630g40e95fcd81c9Text UUID: 7c0cc83a-324a-4bb9-81d3-d452b46af7cbShow Once: True
              • +
                627.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Your sacrifice has not gone forgotten. It's afforded me a life of my own making: hunting and hellslaughter.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a27a2da4-6814-c847-df9f-bc7a58ff0e49Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb7f52236gbdceg43b7g8916g5ee794558509Text UUID: 2dca9ee1-619d-442d-aa54-e871fe46e845Timeline Phase Index: 45Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a27a2da4-6814-c847-df9f-bc7a58ff0e49Timeline Phase Duration: 7.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  109.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The hellhunt is both duty and thrill. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I could tell.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2157be3c-667f-8284-fcb1-05b6fe5ea51aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h046bf31fg974ag45c9g864dg0273769ac186Text UUID: 95d219ca-c593-41c5-8e18-f3bec97e1df6Timeline Phase Index: 272Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2157be3c-667f-8284-fcb1-05b6fe5ea51aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • See Node 553 Jump to Node 223
            • +
              617.Player: It's a pathetic life, to be honest. But I make do.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9f635c89-383e-7a7c-4616-06264cf1135eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4ddbe9c1g8598g4cd0gb235g1c555d0fb988Text UUID: 63d7879c-7162-4f2f-9fce-e865a2d3665bShow Once: True
              • +
                183.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm sorry. I promise, your sacrifice has not gone forgotten. It's afforded me a life of my own making: hunting and hellslaughter.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3274066c-41a4-cf4a-91e0-cf9d499a59e7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h62499397g53d3g402bg9f2eg077b1543cf3eText UUID: b46796a4-8e98-45ea-8de3-f3cd6798d3dbTimeline Phase Index: 229Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3274066c-41a4-cf4a-91e0-cf9d499a59e7Timeline Phase Duration: 10.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • See Node 109 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) The hellhunt is both duty and thrill. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I could tell.
            • +
              415.Player: You're off the mark. To stalk and to feed? You can't imagine a finer pleasure.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6d1b3503-6e03-6d6e-3286-6297dfa16c5bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h289baf4bg21a7g484agb204g01c8655beceaText UUID: 1235bd9f-96eb-439d-be86-e7099e873f4aShow Once: True
              • +
                744.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I, uh - I'll have to take your word for it, but I won't question it.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c1e19a3a-c4c6-5d24-9f8a-66aa575a148fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h573bee88gdb52g4642g99efg6a32cf0c3a6aText UUID: 3bbe197f-3899-42f8-a539-ec45988e8e18Timeline Phase Index: 161Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c1e19a3a-c4c6-5d24-9f8a-66aa575a148fTimeline Phase Duration: 14.95sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: c1e19a3a-c4c6-5d24-9f8a-66aa575a148fGroup Index: 0
                • +
                  775.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My thrill is the hellhunt. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I could tell.

                  Metadata

          97.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Well, never mind that. By the stars' light and the moon's glow, it's so good to see you. And you look every bit the god that you are.ORI_Gale_State_IsGodGale
