          • +
            951.Origin_Intro_Wyll: No time or inclination to get your divine hands dirty in battle, I wager. What different lives we've come to lead.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f8f33e25-c3e9-2224-d70c-99b20ef6e090Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7fd6c48ag9f56g40acgb4a6g75536822f5f9Text UUID: 3c0f1c6f-e9d1-4ec6-95b8-323f97211db4Timeline Phase Index: 306Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f8f33e25-c3e9-2224-d70c-99b20ef6e090Timeline Phase Duration: 18.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: f8f33e25-c3e9-2224-d70c-99b20ef6e090Group Index: 0
            • +
              344.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Me, I'm bound to the hellhunt. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I could tell.

            785.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I suppose a Vampire Ascendant has no time for battle, if a healthy taste for blood.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cd324c86-40ca-a286-b24b-c071ea4de858Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hde0e929bg5458g4893gbe73g0e95904f843fText UUID: adce4939-0044-493c-953a-b6f3391c87c8Group ID: 45e8f816-5d4a-933c-1e80-28a4e12123c0Group Index: 1
            • +
              297.Origin_Intro_Wyll: A pity you can't be there for the hellhunt; you'd grow fat from infernal drippings. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've gutted - the stories I could tell.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 538e6f0b-dfa0-4b14-9937-9d2d0458beb1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd968485fg3e3ag483bg8327ga02cf1eafe08Text UUID: ca869bb1-54e4-4f3c-a004-887d13c3b178Timeline Phase Index: 379Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 538e6f0b-dfa0-4b14-9937-9d2d0458beb1Timeline Phase Duration: 10.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

              926.Player: I sense her presence, yes - and Shar's dismay. Her minions have tried to claim my head several times. Tried and failed.Full-Illithid

                635.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You never were one to shy from battle - or to deny its thrills.

                  427.Origin_Intro_Wyll: In Avernus, there is no end to them. The demons I've disintegrated, the devilkin I've bled - the stories I could tell.

                471.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Yet a warrior's heart still beats within you, Lae'zel of K'liir. It's as plain as the stars in this very sky.

                Metadata

        • +
          493.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh, forget all that. By the stars' light and the moon's glow, it's so good to see you - and I've got so much to tell you!

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8373c174-4af1-1b68-7485-6d79b024b9b9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1bf16e84g164fg463cgadd2g7d74cda47ba8Text UUID: 54782568-b582-414b-92a2-5a9d9700c18eTimeline Phase Index: 72Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8373c174-4af1-1b68-7485-6d79b024b9b9Timeline Phase Duration: 18.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 8373c174-4af1-1b68-7485-6d79b024b9b9Group Index: 0
          • +

          959.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Have you been... comfortable in the Undercity? Is there anything more I can bring you?Full-Illithid

          Flags and Tags

          • +
            448.Player: You've done everything you can. I want for nothing.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 779e87b8-8dce-159b-f87a-06251f08aac2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h25df2c01g5e02g4aa3g892cg0bba71dd534aText UUID: 7452fa68-a8a5-480c-bbea-37ad14bfba64Show Once: True
            • +
              86.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And yet deserve so much more.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 18a1a3db-8f80-5fb8-983a-c53df9c0ae31Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hffd6c7d0g5fa6g493dg8ba3gc17aa80ed5acText UUID: 76a6d6b5-248c-4849-ba15-12655d9db488Timeline Phase Index: 285Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 18a1a3db-8f80-5fb8-983a-c53df9c0ae31Timeline Phase Duration: 3.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • +
                136.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh, before I forget - I've made contact with an assassin, name of Artemis, a killer of killers. Certain arrangements can be made.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2703139d-e97a-b5ad-1c1e-e19ff1584c00Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7b7fef11gd6abg438ag9989g29fb08dcdd1cText UUID: 002773d0-c3b9-49ef-a562-5b9aeccd9cebTimeline Phase Index: 212Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2703139d-e97a-b5ad-1c1e-e19ff1584c00Timeline Phase Duration: 13.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  685.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Your hunger requires sating. And it's not easy to smuggle the spoils of my hunts.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b21f9e94-9947-5b2b-e4d0-c934a7d9b3aaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb0c75e3fga3f8g4b9fg8ff1g79d46d76c92dText UUID: 1105a5c0-92c7-47a2-920f-21fa14c4c136Timeline Phase Index: 216Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b21f9e94-9947-5b2b-e4d0-c934a7d9b3aaTimeline Phase Duration: 15.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: b21f9e94-9947-5b2b-e4d0-c934a7d9b3aaGroup Index: 0
                  • +
                    150.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Speaking of, I've got new stories to tell you - demented devils, demons turned to gore.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2983470f-d596-4aa0-204f-510d04fc9d92Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha921c2e7g1342g4fbagb248gd241e50c8634Text UUID: 1a93b370-c3c0-458b-bcb9-5af3a7c56adeGroup ID: b21f9e94-9947-5b2b-e4d0-c934a7d9b3aaGroup Index: 1
                    • +

            440.Player: I just want more time with you. I miss you.

            • +
              510.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I miss you too. I promise, I'll make more time.

            120.Origin_Intro_Wyll: By the Nine Hells, think of the stories we could tell. The demons we've disintegrated, the devilkin we've bled.

            Metadata

                  535.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You were amazing. When it was over, all that remained was a pair of paltry wings atop a pile of viscera.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8c209276-b819-b0ab-22b2-1b9db68e12b0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf2c8c8a9g20e3g45a9gb153g3a59a6a16627Text UUID: 0b8363fe-d1dd-456e-8835-623276c39bb7Timeline Phase Index: 77Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8c209276-b819-b0ab-22b2-1b9db68e12b0Timeline Phase Duration: 6.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    691.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The Hells fear your name - and the Sword Coast hails it. My lover, my legend.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b4c3e08c-2a7d-05d4-b3a3-53ee383a976eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf1b59d7bgac15g4dc5ga3a3gee8057b2a3cbText UUID: af33136d-92b2-439f-9927-280cf8f321e5Timeline Phase Index: 219Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b4c3e08c-2a7d-05d4-b3a3-53ee383a976eTimeline Phase Duration: 15.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: b4c3e08c-2a7d-05d4-b3a3-53ee383a976eGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      184.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah, but we should get back to the celebration. Unless there's something on your mind?

                      Metadata

                      • +

                          603.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The woman's an expert on devils and their infernal tricks. And she's got some thoughts about my ol' sending stone of an eye.

                        212.Player: Mizora's missions are few and far between. I'm surprised she's afforded you so much freedom.Full-IllithidCAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                        • +
                          490.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'd fall on my own blade and join the Blood War in an instant should she put you or the Sword Coast in danger.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 82e08e29-2b42-5cf0-d46b-619de9ae4f09Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdf214a99g991fg4bfeg85adg98476c261906Text UUID: 2197b9cb-6cd9-4439-af7d-2a536039a48fTimeline Phase Index: 273Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 82e08e29-2b42-5cf0-d46b-619de9ae4f09Timeline Phase Duration: 20.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 82e08e29-2b42-5cf0-d46b-619de9ae4f09Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            105.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Mizora wouldn't dare risk it as long as I'm more valuable as a warlock.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 20c8b07b-e2ef-d3fa-6311-f6fe904e2189Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1ab82208gb72bg4a8cg8ba4g527699f2a4dcText UUID: 4daaa7ba-ee8c-458a-8393-d9788899de96Group ID: 82e08e29-2b42-5cf0-d46b-619de9ae4f09Group Index: 1
                            • +
                              189.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Every target she's set me on's been a demonic intruder - tanar'ri assassins who slip into Avernus, armanites that amass near the Styx.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 34aec856-bf9a-3012-e70f-83b91942dd00Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7c8ffdecgb6deg4ea8g8c63gea253b267088Text UUID: d4b80d7b-d7db-4586-9a35-6dc61e085a74Group ID: 82e08e29-2b42-5cf0-d46b-619de9ae4f09Group Index: 2
                              • +
                                44.No Speaker: Alias to Node 648
                                • •
                                  648.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She's playing a game. I just don't know what it is, or how she plans to win.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8de3707-b0bd-f11a-1f9d-34fb0dc8e2b2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he1bdcc25g3a1cg4d8dg8596g45aa29de1643Text UUID: 2dcbb79a-e363-45f4-8ad8-b3e6d4373756Timeline Phase Index: 40Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a8de3707-b0bd-f11a-1f9d-34fb0dc8e2b2Timeline Phase Duration: 7.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                  719.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'll never forget its howls as it sank into the magma.

                  Metadata

                  • See Node 691 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) The Hells fear your name - and the Sword Coast hails it. My lover, my legend.

                  607.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Understandable. First six devils, then sixteen, sixty, six-hundred. All that remains is a trail of gore.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9d3bef5f-b8d1-9411-4659-882633f22cacSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hce417d06g0fabg4f33ga591g0a3be5f3929cText UUID: a80faf3b-e0fb-4875-958b-915ffb356740Timeline Phase Index: 23Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9d3bef5f-b8d1-9411-4659-882633f22cacTimeline Phase Duration: 8.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

    353.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Gods, love - I must look a mess. I'd just rolled out from under a pesky ogre when Withers yanked me in.note: Wyll sniffs himself, and grimaces at the beginning.ORI_State_PartneredWithWyllEPI_Epilogue_Wyll_HasMet

          526.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Have you been... comfortable in the Undercity? Is there anything more I can bring you?

            537.Player: You've done everything you can. I want for nothing.

            Metadata

            • +
              367.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And yet deserve so much more.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 62fdebcf-8b23-4ce4-c9d6-f715841013dfSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hcef5ebe6g5250g49c9g8702gee2c6c9f628eText UUID: 40027dbe-4e1d-46b3-9e1d-cd622d77b206Timeline Phase Index: 296Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 62fdebcf-8b23-4ce4-c9d6-f715841013dfTimeline Phase Duration: 3.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • +
                708.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Oh, before I forget - I've made contact with an assassin, name of Artemis, a killer of killers. Certain arrangements can be made.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b8783eb7-da94-634d-a5e4-946c8b2071faSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hecd66b18g6517g4fb6g8705gcb356609466dText UUID: 4e1346c6-2fbd-46ae-9d1a-2eac4f7a7ab0Timeline Phase Index: 97Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b8783eb7-da94-634d-a5e4-946c8b2071faTimeline Phase Duration: 13.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  377.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Your hunger requires sating. And it's not easy to smuggle the spoils of my hunts.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 63fa7b4b-6a19-ef0f-405f-b300058e2b62Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd88d6e96gb0d4g447bgb1bag9c635f77ab29Text UUID: de8643c2-8616-4f80-aab4-62ec82106f5dTimeline Phase Index: 346Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 63fa7b4b-6a19-ef0f-405f-b300058e2b62Timeline Phase Duration: 16.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 63fa7b4b-6a19-ef0f-405f-b300058e2b62Group Index: 0
                  • +

                      Variant 2

                      hd6e09fc8gda81g49ffg9aa3g67e7c8129e1e | 9d284766-c3be-46e6-930b-c21ce7c7964d | stub

                      Metadata

                        • •
                          622.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But you stoked new fires in me. The Blade of Frontiers is now the ranger he was destined to be.

                        7.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The woman's an expert on devils and their infernal tricks. And she's got some thoughts about my ol' sending stone of an eye.

                      69.Player: Mizora's missions are few and far between. I'm surprised she's afforded you so much freedom.Full-IllithidCAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                      • Full-Illithid
                      Mizora's missions are few and far between. I'm surprised she's afforded you so much freedom.
                      h3a90a648g9435g4553ga392gfa3aea9955c3 | 717df7d4-bca6-4900-95d6-494d5f9fb75d | stub

                      Variant 2

                      Mizora's missions are few and far between. I'm surprised she's afforded you so much freedom.

                      • +
                        678.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'd fall on my own blade and join the Blood War in an instant should she put you or the Sword Coast in danger.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1433134-9002-81c2-0a4b-9a33ecc83313Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h31e7a7adgd918g452eg8783g237799b16eabText UUID: 27648973-8d7e-41dd-9011-f13da7680b1cTimeline Phase Index: 31Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b1433134-9002-81c2-0a4b-9a33ecc83313Timeline Phase Duration: 22.77sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: b1433134-9002-81c2-0a4b-9a33ecc83313Group Index: 0
                        • +
                          696.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Mizora wouldn't dare risk it as long as I'm more valuable as a warlock.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b587af6a-37c8-a8ce-eac5-b6254b28a4c0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h24daac20gad57g4603g9b19g106c8f0b2af7Text UUID: c7862f33-dd1a-4a7c-bea0-219437332812Group ID: b1433134-9002-81c2-0a4b-9a33ecc83313Group Index: 1
                          • +
                            751.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Every target she's set me on's been a demonic intruder - tanar'ri assassins who slip into Avernus, armanites that amass near the Styx.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c37abf61-a4d2-eaac-4902-7626b97b366cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdedd8b4fg7f37g4aa0g92a8g775bae97e74cText UUID: a965bdd9-12f8-4bb8-8012-77b7f6698be1Group ID: b1433134-9002-81c2-0a4b-9a33ecc83313Group Index: 2
                            • +
                              555.No Speaker: Alias to Node 272
                              • •
                                272.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She's playing a game. I just don't know what it is, or how she plans to win.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c59965e-dea5-f2ca-16c1-32110e22bcb0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he0dc77dcg6b2ag4cdbga3cag9d7669432678Text UUID: c7695bf4-b408-4818-ba89-d926727b28a3Timeline Phase Index: 342Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4c59965e-dea5-f2ca-16c1-32110e22bcb0Timeline Phase Duration: 7.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

            • +
              620.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The two of us versus an army of skeletons, each one a piece of the lich's essence. An impossible victory, in hindsight.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a0491c3a-d2d8-cd64-4ffb-51f7a614c5aaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h50fae81dg4519g47fcgbf18g35e40c984382Text UUID: 6d6bd843-2c2b-4be9-9074-131bd46d029aTimeline Phase Index: 266Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a0491c3a-d2d8-cd64-4ffb-51f7a614c5aaTimeline Phase Duration: 15.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: a0491c3a-d2d8-cd64-4ffb-51f7a614c5aaGroup Index: 0
              • +
                63.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But a victory all the same. Because of your courage, Daggerford still stands.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 11d5ea72-3712-063a-a760-a57c1083b72cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb9a97463gc4f9g4405g9dc3gb52b878c52daText UUID: 63111a5f-abe5-43ff-8f06-7cc3d5741943Group ID: a0491c3a-d2d8-cd64-4ffb-51f7a614c5aaGroup Index: 1
                • See Node 726 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Beasts and bandits alike fear your name - and the Sword Coast hails it. My lover, my legend.
          • +

              715.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The battle was fierce, but it was the celebration after I most remember.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb6ba9fb-189c-a48a-a3ad-a0b112358375Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd5c6aec6gcb99g4d92g8166g8ff2a7b6f53fText UUID: 94a73762-e713-49c8-bccc-b8452ab88f1fTimeline Phase Index: 367Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bb6ba9fb-189c-a48a-a3ad-a0b112358375Timeline Phase Duration: 10.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: bb6ba9fb-189c-a48a-a3ad-a0b112358375Group Index: 0
              • +
                318.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Singing songs, sipping mead with the elves we defended. I still carry their joy with me.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 57d08622-55ed-cdb4-7c25-c3b66901aa01Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3f1b1395g5fd4g4350ga56fga6d72f317cc1Text UUID: 5dca4c86-a256-4087-a9d5-796cdf2d6848Group ID: bb6ba9fb-189c-a48a-a3ad-a0b112358375Group Index: 1

              73.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Understandable. First a goblin, then a ghast, then a gorgon. One victory becomes ten becomes a hundred.

              Metadata

                          352.Origin_Intro_Wyll: How you'd thrill in the Blade's hunt. The trolls I've torn open, the ghouls I've cleaved - the stories I've been itching to tell.!Lae'zel

                                169.No Speaker: Alias to Node 122
                                • +
                                  122.No Speaker: Alias to Node 434
                                  • +
                                    434.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You want to hear about the stegosaurus that bullied Candlekeep, the impossible lich, or the young dragon who crawled out of Deeping Cave?

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 736d1a72-8de2-c10b-c41f-c995dd64cdf3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h42b822cdg4891g40afgbdf0g91642edb175eText UUID: f692714f-3d68-4ee7-bafa-b60cb68cb97fTimeline Phase Index: 317Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 736d1a72-8de2-c10b-c41f-c995dd64cdf3Timeline Phase Duration: 10.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                    • +
                                      594.Player: A dinosaur battle? Tell me every bloody detail.Full-Illithid

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      ruletagtype rule
                                      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                                      Text

                                      Variant 1

                                      combine=0
                                      • Full-Illithid
                                      A dinosaur battle? Tell me every bloody detail.
                                      h9697081egcda1g4ddegb365g994b17de9243 | 00191d94-525e-4e1f-a667-a69f4925852b | stub

                                      Variant 2

                                      A dinosaur battle? Tell me every bloody detail.
                                      h96079e8bg7d60g4905g9ec7gb94a2f52e37b | e2eb3f2a-e971-4db9-8b16-6bdec37ae93e | stub

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9ab1ea85-b712-6c05-1ada-747da1c7bb03Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h9697081egcda1g4ddegb365g994b17de9243Text 1 UUID: 00191d94-525e-4e1f-a667-a69f4925852bText 2 Handle: h96079e8bg7d60g4905g9ec7gb94a2f52e37bText 2 UUID: e2eb3f2a-e971-4db9-8b16-6bdec37ae93eShow Once: True
                                      • +
                                        832.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Wizards have a penchant for unusual pets, as you very well know. A flying cat? Delightful. A menagerie of dinosaurs, on the other hand...Gale

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: db8ecd97-4c4e-e608-e13b-22f15cd864e7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdb77bce4g65acg496ega812gbabe071c26d7Text UUID: 487a0678-0dc1-4a6d-9480-fc0d206e278aTimeline Phase Index: 176Timeline Dialog Node UUID: db8ecd97-4c4e-e608-e13b-22f15cd864e7Timeline Phase Duration: 11.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • +
                                          430.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The wizard in question was called Rylen. Had a half-dozen eggs smuggled into Candlekeep from the jungle.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd422da9agd110g415fgb35eg2f2343bd028bText UUID: d335ae80-d20b-4254-93d6-643e49dbc6d2Timeline Phase Index: 250Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Timeline Phase Duration: 67.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Group Index: 0
                                          • +
                                            43.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Did you know it takes three tendays for a hatchling stegosaurus to reach the size of a cave bear?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0b9a7938-41d6-f715-7447-1cb07f9ae4b8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha8045cf2ge9b4g41e4gb94fg73483e616a63Text UUID: 5dc929e6-3bd8-41a9-aa91-ed209e1b65c2Group ID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Group Index: 1
                                            • +
                                              103.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Rylen sure didn't. Wasn't a month before the place was overrun by rampaging stegos. The Great Readers dealt with five of them without too much trouble. The remaining one, well...

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 204c4766-30d0-7d46-923d-951aa45df9a9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h41b41111g6eb5g4e7fga1d5g92683d1c1795Text UUID: bc9cfc64-3ff3-4a81-a910-eb8e303c8ac6Group ID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Group Index: 2
                                              • +
                                                674.Origin_Intro_Wyll: ... young Rylen cast Enlarge on it by mistake. The beast rampaged through the baths, demolished Oghma's temple, and smashed through the east wall.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aec36619-ea6a-3f68-237e-9387bbe37abcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h27623e56g5305g44f3ga33bgea992bfd7f24Text UUID: ba712983-06fa-4b8e-b102-f4b3757d6381Group ID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Group Index: 3
                                                • +
                                                  771.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Stegos may not have much taste for meat, but they've got a hell of a temper. Luckily, this one had only clobbered a few farmhouses once I'd caught up.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c76066d9-5a20-7f69-90c3-17624c2fa443Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h37c80869g91fbg48c4g917cg15a0136b32f5Text UUID: 063c4345-6e8c-4999-8809-f8cb0a53288cGroup ID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Group Index: 4
                                                  • +
                                                    239.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The ground shook as it charged me. I vaulted over the beast and grabbed it by the tail. It bucked and bellowed as I climbed its plates and straddled its head.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3fd15c3d-4cc3-639f-0309-2b708f95dd96Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hff113f93g6ecfg43feg8728gba6261c0e9bcText UUID: b139b35b-9a17-4a14-970c-b68e9c0902c5Group ID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Group Index: 5
                                                    • +
                                                      257.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I plunged a blade into the left eye, straight to the brain. It fell to the ground with a thud; bet the ravens are still picking at its carcass to this day.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4700beee-eb62-4eb8-97b4-083700bbb2c9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hded8865dg74ecg4290g969fg38a3778f4e3eText UUID: 59895fff-79f5-4c4f-9f0b-4c21f279e181Group ID: 708ff142-8d70-2f20-ae7e-e411c4c1cee9Group Index: 6
                                                      • •
                                                        570.Jump to Node 615

                                                        Metadata

                                      • +
                                        963.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Wizards have a penchant for unusual pets. A flying cat? Delightful. A menagerie of dinosaurs, on the other hand...

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fc7a1674-0531-3871-4884-9c4ed27e0618Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h85d62613g368cg42f1g8a27g4308a7e4cad0Text UUID: 91c7f3d9-ac8b-48ea-a436-05abec01b675Timeline Phase Index: 131Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fc7a1674-0531-3871-4884-9c4ed27e0618Timeline Phase Duration: 9.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • See Node 430 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) The wizard in question was called Rylen. Had a half-dozen eggs smuggled into Candlekeep from the jungle.
                                    • +
                                      395.Player: The lich, most certainly. It must have posed quite the challenge.Full-Illithid

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      ruletagtype rule
                                      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                                      Text

                                      Variant 1

                                      combine=0
                                      • Full-Illithid
                                      The lich, most certainly. It must have posed quite the challenge.
                                      h3880eec0g27b8g4a34g9337g3097ec967d8d | 5c7e6dc1-fd8d-4dbb-83c3-37fd64fda2e2 | stub

                                      Variant 2

                                      The lich, most certainly. It must have posed quite the challenge.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 69171c48-c409-efee-fbf8-958d84d6704aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h3880eec0g27b8g4a34g9337g3097ec967d8dText 1 UUID: 5c7e6dc1-fd8d-4dbb-83c3-37fd64fda2e2Text 2 Handle: h658c99dfg85beg4f5egbeb2gd7d47d480686Text 2 UUID: 6e2d21e6-2651-4efb-860b-4a7a1dffa743Show Once: True
                                      • +
                                        913.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It did - though the adventure had peaceful beginnings, as so many often so.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee9703fc-da3f-adc0-fdee-5017f772fef4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h94e42793g6a5dg478cg8abaga922841e8a3eText UUID: b812eed2-ce17-4bd7-b9d4-e2385d83e8fcTimeline Phase Index: 215Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ee9703fc-da3f-adc0-fdee-5017f772fef4Timeline Phase Duration: 28.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: ee9703fc-da3f-adc0-fdee-5017f772fef4Group Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          676.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'd made camp south of Daggerford. The night was calm, lit by the green lanterns of a caravan. I was about to dig into a hearty stew when it began:

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b09ce043-9bd0-c6fa-370b-e82642980d77Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6d57f3ffgf64bg480fg9b8bg59a7ac02f7e9Text UUID: 6c5d80f3-fbe5-4ebc-bfcb-9c158b46d85fGroup ID: ee9703fc-da3f-adc0-fdee-5017f772fef4Group Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            128.Origin_Intro_Wyll: A deluge of bone.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2571900a-3d16-e7a3-121f-b08580ec3c54Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h55b74176ga944g4724gb0c2g7fd444de7494Text UUID: 7bb1bb91-95cc-4df1-a995-5dce4f6e8a22Group ID: ee9703fc-da3f-adc0-fdee-5017f772fef4Group Index: 2
                                            • +
                                              292.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It was as if a thousand skeletons were walking the skies and had split into pieces. Skulls, knuckles, ribs rained down on me.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 528fb592-b956-f4ad-1aaf-af3bb4746f3dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h89d66a82ge724g458ag883dgfed105ab82f9Text UUID: e78212a6-2770-4c2b-b4d9-ae0c73b41d88Group ID: ee9703fc-da3f-adc0-fdee-5017f772fef4Group Index: 3
                                              • +
                                                802.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I shielded myself with Armour of Agathys and made for the light. The bones clumped and clattered into unspeakable aberrations.CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Global
                                                • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d168a4d8-429c-a0ed-8fd5-3575f3d2cffeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h5eb542efg5321g45d6g93d1ge9301553105eText UUID: 1047fb3d-c1b0-4a12-926a-99327a6bdf9dTimeline Phase Index: 186Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d168a4d8-429c-a0ed-8fd5-3575f3d2cffeTimeline Phase Duration: 8.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • +
                                                  392.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I cast and carved until I reached the light. I found no caravan, but a sickly-green lich. Each fallen bone was a shard of its essence. An impossibility!

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 684d3514-9727-4440-c51e-12f66ea0a620Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2fda98cdge46bg4686gb603g9727c2f6d0a5Text UUID: 9189f878-0367-45f1-a313-9c1b2b1584b4Timeline Phase Index: 344Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 684d3514-9727-4440-c51e-12f66ea0a620Timeline Phase Duration: 26.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 684d3514-9727-4440-c51e-12f66ea0a620Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    270.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah, but what does a world of Netherbrains and magic crowns care about the impossible?

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4aca84cc-6d56-67e5-0392-d9ccb04818b4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1bcd5bb5gb767g47eaga01fg9e08d82668c5Text UUID: bd3f1567-26ff-4def-b6ac-aeb26ab10f3fGroup ID: 684d3514-9727-4440-c51e-12f66ea0a620Group Index: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      615.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I raged through the night. By morning, the fields were buried in shards of bone, the lich's included.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9f1a5ec8-e816-7c3d-c1f5-5a83fce39f07Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: haff4c562g4ca2g431agb52ag256e592a580bText UUID: c6d9b3b8-6440-4256-aed3-cfdc947b4e77Group ID: 684d3514-9727-4440-c51e-12f66ea0a620Group Index: 2
                                                      • +

                                                          • •
                                                            123.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah. A kiss as sweet as the first you ever gave me.

                                                            Metadata

                                                          681.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And I you.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1aa0451-8ec5-ddaa-94b2-e91d82aef024Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd5598f63g2e1ag4077g98f5ga91ab9db2cc6Text UUID: a9983937-20fe-4263-abbc-d66d840dc9b0Timeline Phase Index: 29Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b1aa0451-8ec5-ddaa-94b2-e91d82aef024Timeline Phase Duration: 1.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            163.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I know you're doing what's best for Karlach. If the roles were reversed, I'd have done the same.a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll

                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                            settype Local
                                                            • a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll {9c7448d5-af06-2578-5461-55f271970ed4} = True

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2d0f3971-ca3a-7782-75dc-22f975eadaf0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6ea7260eg469bg4c9cgac8bg8da2c255d3faText UUID: 885909c7-c490-4692-a2bc-4b086e8decdfTimeline Phase Index: 200Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2d0f3971-ca3a-7782-75dc-22f975eadaf0Timeline Phase Duration: 21.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 2d0f3971-ca3a-7782-75dc-22f975eadaf0Group Index: 0
                                                            • +
                                                              958.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But a pang still strikes my chest when I imagine the two of you slaying devils without me.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb80a012-e1a5-f6de-253b-841bfae125d8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: haa2b11a0g8b3cg41ebgb612gcf4b25c2939bText UUID: 33d6b3b3-9d7e-4e1d-9c42-119269ec7029Group ID: 2d0f3971-ca3a-7782-75dc-22f975eadaf0Group Index: 1
                                                              • •
                                                                974.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Do what you must, for yourself and for Karlach. I will be here waiting for you. Always.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fe7a7f61-c327-c359-80b1-1c1c63de4975Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h70e47220g5633g4156gad4fg094d5e9996cdText UUID: 804613fa-70aa-4d85-919d-7e341557281aGroup ID: 2d0f3971-ca3a-7782-75dc-22f975eadaf0Group Index: 2
                                                      • +

                                                          661.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And I you.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: abc16010-b998-04c9-e057-32f3b077689fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he9228f5egd2c0g423ag9434gbcf7086e94adText UUID: 2690178b-8cce-4f8e-8164-29145ad6e864Timeline Phase Index: 46Timeline Dialog Node UUID: abc16010-b998-04c9-e057-32f3b077689fTimeline Phase Duration: 1.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            967.Origin_Intro_Wyll: When I look to the sky, I imagine you atop a red dragon, soaring across the endless night.a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll

                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                            settype Local
                                                            • a8be79f3-87eb-27a0-c34b-b5f77cf7f068_MissesWyll {9c7448d5-af06-2578-5461-55f271970ed4} = True

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fd4cf0cb-f1b5-2fdc-3f73-5f30a10630a7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7553c638g0a56g4aa8g94c4gf72dd4e48c7cText UUID: 8d11aec0-d8bf-4afa-ae55-12a574bea510Timeline Phase Index: 326Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fd4cf0cb-f1b5-2fdc-3f73-5f30a10630a7Timeline Phase Duration: 23.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: fd4cf0cb-f1b5-2fdc-3f73-5f30a10630a7Group Index: 0
                                                            • +
                                                              413.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And when my body gives way to exhaustion, I picture your dragon landing beside me. You dismount, we lock eyes - and you sink into my waiting arms.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c6b6d9a-3ffd-cf10-0570-4dc097ecc020Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7d29b75fg4287g4336gb07bgdd795d90fcffText UUID: c502f0fb-7abb-4d4f-aa08-9f0e6c2ad3a4Group ID: fd4cf0cb-f1b5-2fdc-3f73-5f30a10630a7Group Index: 1
                                                              • •
                                                                671.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And one day, I know we will make this dream a reality.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ae341e54-d3b8-9932-5856-c4a0f48e109fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h4bac5b6dgb403g48d4ga1e4g7516f3d38911Text UUID: 3a45ec7a-89ce-4f88-a6f4-a165851fa7abGroup ID: fd4cf0cb-f1b5-2fdc-3f73-5f30a10630a7Group Index: 2
                                                      • +

                                                        • +
                                                          576.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I wish you'd been there to join in! Oh, to battle together, just like the old days.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 95bb8e0a-45b3-36d1-4016-f54537709a1aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h66c9ed08g42eag4c58gb085gc1d35a6ec03dText UUID: cd4ef856-d36b-4cf0-bd04-5dd29c7b5251Timeline Phase Index: 13Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 95bb8e0a-45b3-36d1-4016-f54537709a1aTimeline Phase Duration: 16.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 95bb8e0a-45b3-36d1-4016-f54537709a1aGroup Index: 0
                                                          • +
                                                            952.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I suppose that's my way of saying I miss you. Tonight, I toast not just the people we've become -

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9685ced-0e1f-85e2-c023-5b85f5a65184Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha2689089g0a45g4077g89a7gc33bae68aab8Text UUID: ed74dfa3-0c9f-4d4f-ba93-bdf27f4c4a32Group ID: 95bb8e0a-45b3-36d1-4016-f54537709a1aGroup Index: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              402.Origin_Intro_Wyll: - but the people we were. Warriors. Winners. Saviours. Lovers.ORI_Wyll_State_TogetherButApart

                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                              checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

                                                              • •
                                                                442.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My heart is still yours. And so it will be, until time stops and the planes split to pieces.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 74a7f732-7f60-d1a6-9a79-9023e13ef104Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hbac8615fg1bc5g4abdg9acfg86a841bc6419Text UUID: 266c7cf3-c4de-418b-8d07-9870db00a35eGroup ID: 6a465793-0f30-2f26-2f76-6dafb01c7d7dGroup Index: 1
                                                            • •

                                                          619.No Speaker: Alias to Node 562
                                                          • +
                                                            562.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So I stoked new fires in myself using the lessons my father once taught me.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 924c541e-7f15-9589-a228-8fc210b0d446Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he9776792g01a5g4d4agb387gd54932d153e3Text UUID: be274f1a-37c8-4bfd-a0e6-e7e57a70ede1Timeline Phase Index: 20Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 924c541e-7f15-9589-a228-8fc210b0d446Timeline Phase Duration: 6.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                            • •
                                                              469.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Now the Blade of Frontiers is a ranger - a true hunter of monsters, a warden in more than just name.

                                                        Variant 2

                                                        Your father must be proud of you. Have you been visiting?
                                                        hef7e82afgf733g466dga129ga16e9f9f1dea | a189645a-38bf-45de-87f6-8d7674c3d76f | stub

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bc2dd859-215c-10f5-b9f7-97846b3dc859Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hcb2afd3dg5763g461bga01dg7bbf303eebd0Text 1 UUID: df2dd013-785e-44e7-a42e-f50b228e66c1Text 2 Handle: hef7e82afgf733g466dga129ga16e9f9f1deaText 2 UUID: a189645a-38bf-45de-87f6-8d7674c3d76fShow Once: True
                                                        • +
                                                          243.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I've seen him more than a few times. And he's as proud of me as I am of him.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 41410c46-abba-d41a-fac0-36a61ece06f6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6f2e651bg39e1g4c8dgb5d9g8f3a1be2c807Text UUID: e3e16884-b844-4799-bcfc-151eef74edc0Timeline Phase Index: 356Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 41410c46-abba-d41a-fac0-36a61ece06f6Timeline Phase Duration: 12.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 41410c46-abba-d41a-fac0-36a61ece06f6Group Index: 0
                                                          • +
                                                            920.Origin_Intro_Wyll: He's leading the city's renewal, opened the Gates to all newcomers, rebuilt the Council from scratch.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f0b22d70-0bb1-1dfe-ac3d-1845faf333e3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he56a2cd9g3c5cg4c9bg9fcfg0e9057183f07Text UUID: b9576b2d-4929-4b39-89e4-71557de3ddc2Group ID: 41410c46-abba-d41a-fac0-36a61ece06f6Group Index: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              252.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And he's back in his element - commanding the Flaming Fist with brave heart and no shortage of empathy.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 43fa7cd1-e634-80da-abfd-b0a73fe205fdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h5ec7850cg729dg416fg928cg096b99a57f2bText UUID: 166bed63-be41-4bf9-9031-81b78040a247Timeline Phase Index: 352Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 43fa7cd1-e634-80da-abfd-b0a73fe205fdTimeline Phase Duration: 8.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                              • +

                                                        391.Player: And Mizora? Is she next on your kill list?Full-IllithidORI_Wyll_State_GoAfterMizora!CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact!EPI_EPilogue_Wyll_MizoraChaseEPI_EPilogue_Wyll_MizoraChase

                                                        ruletagtype rule

                                                        • EPI_EPilogue_Wyll_MizoraChase {9583e06f-6705-e73a-d546-1b196bcdd3bf} = True

                                                        Text

                                                        Variant 1

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Full-Illithid
                                                        And Mizora? Is she next on your kill list?
                                                        hccec65c7g88ebg4e06gb399g20078196e1db | 2adbcfcd-01c2-4088-9f73-e5657ce20391 | stub

                                                        Variant 2

                                                        And Mizora? Is she next on your kill list?
                                                        hfcac5f66g7827g4d1egab48gc1028075b995 | 8917f287-1547-48ec-8492-9831c1d481fb | stub

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 681b4eb7-9b4a-700a-e5cc-b2f4b329f44aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hccec65c7g88ebg4e06gb399g20078196e1dbText 1 UUID: 2adbcfcd-01c2-4088-9f73-e5657ce20391Text 2 Handle: hfcac5f66g7827g4d1egab48gc1028075b995Text 2 UUID: 8917f287-1547-48ec-8492-9831c1d481fbShow Once: True
                                                        • +
                                                          915.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She's kept herself hidden, the wily arsehole that she is. But turns out, there's a way I could find her.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef28ff11-abf1-1d8c-b907-1a36e896f614Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he6de5855g43dbg44a2gbe34g5ad96673ef60Text UUID: 5abf8e8d-995c-4118-abb4-b6f81b5b21feTimeline Phase Index: 102Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef28ff11-abf1-1d8c-b907-1a36e896f614Timeline Phase Duration: 8.11sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            524.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm in contact with a diabolist out in Calimshan, an expert on devils and their infernal tricks. And she's got some thoughts about my ol' sending stone of an eye.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 89e14cc4-6ffa-5044-36bd-e98d1572d379Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb3646055g5b0ag4d75gb32egce99c32a0070Text UUID: c66afc2e-3a82-4dd3-8ec6-33af1eb6dc29Timeline Phase Index: 82Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 89e14cc4-6ffa-5044-36bd-e98d1572d379Timeline Phase Duration: 10.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                            • +
                                                              962.Origin_Intro_Wyll: If my patron could use it to track me, we might be able to track her. Or so the theory goes.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fbf6a6ac-bd6f-74fe-5d2b-0857bb063e5eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h97a5a61fg03dfg4de2g83b9g16930128999fText UUID: 23edf2f7-cc34-4713-ab8a-a604d9efa47bTimeline Phase Index: 132Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fbf6a6ac-bd6f-74fe-5d2b-0857bb063e5eTimeline Phase Duration: 6.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                              • •
                                                                947.Origin_Intro_Wyll: We meet in a tenday. If the diabolist's right, the eye could lead me right to Mizora. It's past time her old pet gets to sink in his fangs.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f75d9abe-537d-4711-2233-33fede3a2c85Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h1bd34419g1726g4c4dgbb96g60398a53ec11Text UUID: 1ba44be6-363b-4c57-a29c-9a6e416dc20bTimeline Phase Index: 140Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f75d9abe-537d-4711-2233-33fede3a2c85Timeline Phase Duration: 11.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • +
                                                        739.Player: Mizora must keep you busy with her missions, too.Full-IllithidCAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                        ruletagtype rule
                                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                                                        checktype Global
                                                        • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = True

                                                        Text

                                                        Variant 1

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Full-Illithid
                                                        Mizora must keep you busy with her missions, too.
                                                        h8bd1b260g9550g47fdga09ega51afd0a9a0e | cb2bced6-39cf-47c9-abf6-d1a7670463e3 | stub

                                                        Variant 2

                                                        Mizora must keep you busy with her missions, too.
                                                        h3c4bfe12g2b45g4495gbcd6gf70dcb9a7498 | 747451da-1e16-4699-b073-b73d4380d4ed | stub

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c07fe4b0-f047-7a0d-01c7-22eaa10a2005Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h8bd1b260g9550g47fdga09ega51afd0a9a0eText 1 UUID: cb2bced6-39cf-47c9-abf6-d1a7670463e3Text 2 Handle: h3c4bfe12g2b45g4495gbcd6gf70dcb9a7498Text 2 UUID: 747451da-1e16-4699-b073-b73d4380d4edShow Once: True
                                                        • +
                                                          407.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She's kept her leash loose - though I've been no stranger to the Hells.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6b314a36-d853-0d8e-55b9-02a0eaa6613cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf0ad2f27g96f1g498fgbfd9g9bea589db11dText UUID: 12dfbc10-db7a-4650-a5c3-df903ce4a234Timeline Phase Index: 328Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6b314a36-d853-0d8e-55b9-02a0eaa6613cTimeline Phase Duration: 6.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            213.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Every target she's set me on's been a demonic intruder - tanar'ri assassins who slip into Avernus, armanites that amass near the Styx.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a8eb8ff-9502-fac9-7afa-d1891a35a29aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2205d370ge0feg4414gb6bagf0e68a3f6d85Text UUID: 7585a7ba-d0d6-421a-aaee-425fe7d716adTimeline Phase Index: 222Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3a8eb8ff-9502-fac9-7afa-d1891a35a29aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              167.Origin_Intro_Wyll: My next mark's the most challenging yet, or so she says. I don't know much more, only that it's no demon - but a devil.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2d8074b1-9ea4-4808-8bd7-13062896a012Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha1bfda64gad1ag4bc0g8388g012c8f40ce7fText UUID: 878b88c4-9880-40b4-b194-c0e285e5e913Timeline Phase Index: 198Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2d8074b1-9ea4-4808-8bd7-13062896a012Timeline Phase Duration: 9.85sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                              • +
                                                                345.Origin_Intro_Wyll: She's playing a game. I don't know what it is, or how she plans to win. But I can tell you this much:

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d45c8d8-14dc-82f5-1c95-0f7bcf30259fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h470463fdg4622g4d96gbdedg62384a9617e2Text UUID: a8f81f06-115d-46be-96c6-dbdf1a3b24d0Timeline Phase Index: 209Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5d45c8d8-14dc-82f5-1c95-0f7bcf30259fTimeline Phase Duration: 22.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 5d45c8d8-14dc-82f5-1c95-0f7bcf30259fGroup Index: 0
                                                                • +
                                                                  144.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'd fall on my own blade and join the Blood War in an instant should Zariel's Hells-touched fingers stretch towards the Coast.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 287bf13b-a539-f30c-80c1-693e9745a32bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6b5edbc3g17deg4d90ga373g612b327d611aText UUID: 0e8b16d2-9b3e-4e20-832d-2a34562b4750Group ID: 5d45c8d8-14dc-82f5-1c95-0f7bcf30259fGroup Index: 1
                                                                  • •
                                                                    162.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And as long as I'm more useful as a warlock, that's not a risk Mizora would take.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2d04e5ff-044a-23f9-2473-3214945837d2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6c7aa58ag3ab7g4f15gbd50g71f1318db293Text UUID: d2b83adc-08a4-4f08-9f89-164262ffc521Group ID: 5d45c8d8-14dc-82f5-1c95-0f7bcf30259fGroup Index: 2
                                                      • +

                                                        • •
                                                          208.Jump to Node 573

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: JumpUUID: 3979eb20-5d2b-cbf9-b0ce-ae5d7783833eJump Target: Node 573 (94b04b51-c634-80c3-58c6-f44e4d6a9f16)Jump Target Point: 2
                                              • +
                                                567.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I turned my skin to bark and made for the light. The bones clumped and clattered into unspeakable aberrations.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 93193e95-4dc8-415d-9820-4ceb476af8a6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf5afa674g6b43g44dcga1dfg1e2754047bbcText UUID: 30ff01aa-9e38-43eb-b604-9b181c251161Timeline Phase Index: 18Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 93193e95-4dc8-415d-9820-4ceb476af8a6Timeline Phase Duration: 9.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • See Node 392 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) I cast and carved until I reached the light. I found no caravan, but a sickly-green lich. Each fallen bone was a shard of its essence. An impossibility!
                                    • +
                                      365.Player: I couldn't say no to a story about a dragon.Full-Illithid

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      ruletagtype rule
                                      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                                      Text

                                      Variant 1

                                      combine=0
                                      • Full-Illithid
                                      I couldn't say no to a story about a dragon.
                                      hc2735f37g0d19g433eg80bbg4e31d9e5850a | 88553c43-8f6d-42ad-9909-77d4d6acf01b | stub

                                      Variant 2

                                      I couldn't say no to a story about a dragon.
                                      h49d9f25ag1ac8g436dg9df7g3db747f102f0 | b1d39f67-910e-4176-a3ac-cbe698e39c24 | stub

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 62632f9d-2412-9aac-27b1-5a343f879c80Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hc2735f37g0d19g433eg80bbg4e31d9e5850aText 1 UUID: 88553c43-8f6d-42ad-9909-77d4d6acf01bText 2 Handle: h49d9f25ag1ac8g436dg9df7g3db747f102f0Text 2 UUID: b1d39f67-910e-4176-a3ac-cbe698e39c24Show Once: True
                                      • +
                                        246.Origin_Intro_Wyll: There're tales galore of a great green dragon called Claugiyliamatar. Try saying that five times in a row!

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h4bf57609g6310g4148g8f50gf0131e4173edText UUID: 02c5a756-60af-4c56-85a3-7687e9165ed2Timeline Phase Index: 287Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Timeline Phase Duration: 50.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Group Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          692.Origin_Intro_Wyll: 'Claugiyliamatar'. 'Clog-ee-myalarfer'. 'Cloff-a-mother-f...' Whatever - let's call it Old Gnawbone.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b5137cf2-2de3-0d7f-b06a-4723b7aeb216Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h5ead379fg0783g4ed3gb0d8gec4130585309Text UUID: 5018d474-7fe6-4004-80b4-d1277782b877Group ID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Group Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            329.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Turns out, Old Gnawbone had kids. And one of them flew the roost and took to stalking a small elven enclave outside Kryptgarden Forest.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a680025-21bb-80bb-c7ae-389b9fe3173dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2472e3cdg9280g4ae6g9180gfdc152644fe1Text UUID: 13ce8320-9e73-4ed7-a154-f0553d5eca6dGroup ID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Group Index: 2
                                            • +
                                              115.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The damn dragon had turned the place into a slave camp before I arrived. Sordid beyond words.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 239d04cb-7f3b-22e1-82c8-64fd6719c9cbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd98fc011g1b66g4bb5gbd09g07e749c0ea2dText UUID: a26d7b4f-4f01-4502-8e17-cc5cacb8d95cGroup ID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Group Index: 3
                                              • +
                                                265.Origin_Intro_Wyll: He was a big boy - but still a young'un. A wonder of the skies but a lumbering oaf on the ground.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 49561c8c-b238-8b0f-ddd6-4964ec1f0831Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h42a8991eg167ag4925g8d54gecd537d978f0Text UUID: 48d5df30-d382-4a71-a382-e623a19a363cGroup ID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Group Index: 4
                                                • +
                                                  76.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I tried a sly approach, but the whelp saw me coming and up it flew. Poison poured from its mouth as it descended.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 16d87711-1222-b2ca-e23e-fe344ab7bdc7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h71a88df5g9bd7g4c32ga764g2fbf694cfc14Text UUID: 9ab3db75-bab2-4d6e-b7f9-ac8634e4df2aGroup ID: 4251f012-3f81-2f7d-9475-0252e1f64399Group Index: 5
                                                  • +
                                                    194.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I tumbled away, cast Flesh to Stone, and it crashed to the ground. I could have ended the battle there and then. But this was prey that deserved to be played with.CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact

                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                    checktype Global
                                                    • CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllEternalPact {8da8b1fb-5aa9-8cf5-8b45-6f8ca31a1227} = True

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36195d8c-08e0-2e30-f3b9-f32429e14d0eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h24273256g6b32g4256g8e98g5ea843d1000eText UUID: ec995088-03e8-4699-be0c-59eca94642daTimeline Phase Index: 234Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 36195d8c-08e0-2e30-f3b9-f32429e14d0eTimeline Phase Duration: 12.9sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                    • +
                                                      342.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The beast was a smoking heap of black-green scales once the battle was over. The elves and I sang songs and drank mead in celebration until their barrels went dry.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5c814c8e-8ea8-d330-4c69-3cf841eb4aa2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h38d8e9e6g7bb1g4f03ga136g0ce021bb170aText UUID: 13d30fe2-2604-481c-be86-2f3a10fef46eTimeline Phase Index: 308Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5c814c8e-8ea8-d330-4c69-3cf841eb4aa2Timeline Phase Duration: 12.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • •
                                                        550.Jump to Node 615

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: JumpUUID: 90908a75-ce43-0f9e-b76b-59e6f1a834fdJump Target: Node 615 (9f1a5ec8-e816-7c3d-c1f5-5a83fce39f07)Jump Target Point: 2
                                                  • +
                                                    479.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I tumbled away, shot it with arrows, and it crashed to the ground. I could have ended the battle there and then. But this was prey that deserved to be played with.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 808762a8-7275-d0e7-b175-ed1636d4afa6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7a4c6019g8754g424dg9ff3ge9035d3fdb2cText UUID: e139a5e4-36b7-4aae-8915-e6088edd8c63Timeline Phase Index: 54Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 808762a8-7275-d0e7-b175-ed1636d4afa6Timeline Phase Duration: 11.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                    • See Node 342 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) The beast was a smoking heap of black-green scales once the battle was over. The elves and I sang songs and drank mead in celebration until their barrels went dry.
                            • +
                              281.Player: A tale of battle told by Blade of Frontiers? I'm eager to hear!Full-Illithid!GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiers

                              Flags and Tags

                              ruletagtype rule
                              • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                              checktype Global
                              • GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiers {8c46322f-7965-94c7-1318-62c391f1c8f1} = False

                              Text

                              Variant 1

                              combine=0

                                        266.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Till then, I'll keep sinking my blades into every monster threatening the Sword Coast. And I've got a story for each and every one.

                          89.Origin_Intro_Wyll: How you'd thrill in the Blade's hunt, Lae'zel. The trolls I've torn open, the ghouls I've cleaved - the stories I've been itching to tell.

            199.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But dammit all, you are too bold a soul to be slinking in shadows, tentacles or not.

            Metadata

            • +
              324.Player: I made my choice for the good of Faerûn and beyond. I don't regret it.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 584ec3bc-3769-2a91-467f-d1c4ef41b70cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc57aefedga9cag43f3gbcb3gfd8e0b1e6e86Text UUID: 5bb57338-693a-4842-a4ed-cd7e2ccde47aShow Once: True
              • +

              274.Player: It's a pathetic life, to be honest. But I make do.

                146.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You walk a righteous path, Shadowheart. And I wager you don't shy from righteous battles.

                Metadata

                • See Node 702 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) If only you could join me. The trolls I've torn open, the ghouls I've cleaved - the stories I've been itching to tell.
